title: Persephone's Torch: A 15th Magnitude Quadruply-Lensed Quasar From the Couch Discovered with SPHEREx and the LBT
comment: 6 pages, 4 figures
summary: Here we report the spectroscopic and geometric confirmation of an extremely bright ($i=14.77$) and compact (Einstein radius of $\sim0.45''$) quadruply-lensed quasar at $z=2.22$, J1330$-$0905, which we dub Persephone's Torch. The system had been previously selected as a candidate lensed quasar based on large-area survey data; here we confirm its quasar nature and redshift using public spectrophotometry from the SPHEREx mission, a.k.a. "from the couch". Adaptive optics imaging with LBT/LUCI resolves four images in a "circular kite" configuration. The system is the brightest gravitationally-lensed quasar system ever found. While an elliptical power-law mass distribution plus external shear accurately reproduces the locations of the images and lensing galaxy, and predicts a total magnification of $\sim56$, the brightnesses of the lensed images present highly anomalous flux ratios. Together with short time delays between images ($\leq 2$ days), this makes Persephone's Torch a promising candidate for future microlensing studies. Our discovery highlights the potential of SPHEREx full-sky infrared spectrophotometry to uncover extraordinarily bright objects that have otherwise been overlooked.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过SPHEREx任务的光谱测量和LBT/LUCI的自适应光学成像，确认了红移为2.22、极为明亮（$i=14.77$）且紧凑（爱因斯坦半径约0.45角秒）的四重透镜类星体（quasar）J1330-0905（Persephone's Torch），发现其图像亮度存在高度异常的通量比，是迄今发现的最亮引力透镜类星体系，为未来微引力透镜（microlensing）研究提供了理想候选目标。
AI.background: 该研究聚焦于利用先进观测技术（如SPHEREx任务的红外分光测光）发现和确认宇宙中极端明亮的引力透镜天体，以探索高红移类星体（quasar）的物理特性及透镜质量分布。
AI.data: 研究使用了来自SPHEREx任务的公共分光光度测量数据（"from the couch"）以及LBT/LUCI的自适应光学成像数据。
AI.method: 采用自适应光学成像（adaptive optics imaging）和椭圆幂律质量分布加外部剪切（elliptical power-law mass distribution plus external shear）的透镜模型进行几何构型分析和光度异常（anomalous flux ratios）研究。
AI.result: 该研究通过SPHEREx任务的光谱测定和LBT/LUCI的自适应光学成像，确认了J1330−0905（Persephone's Torch）是一个红移为2.22、亮度极高（i=14.77）、结构紧凑（爱因斯坦半径约0.45角秒）的四重成像透镜类星体（quadruply-lensed quasar），其图像呈“圆形风筝”构型，并且是该类系统中迄今发现的最亮系统。

title: From Clumps to Sheets: Geometry Controls the Temperature PDF of Multi-Phase Gas
comment: 18 pages, 19 figures. Will submit to The Open Journal of Astrophysics
summary: Temperature probability distribution functions (PDFs) are a compact description of the thermal structure of multi-phase turbulent gas, and are directly linked to observables such as emission/absorption line ratios and phase mass fractions. In the circumgalactic medium (CGM) literature, temperature PDFs are often interpreted using planar turbulent radiative mixing layers, for which analytic models successfully reproduce the simulated temperature structure. These PDFs are assumed to be universal. By contrast, studies of the multiphase interstellar medium (ISM) typically use turbulent-box simulations, which produce broad PDFs but lack a clear theoretical interpretation. Using 3D hydrodynamic simulations under both ISM and CGM conditions, we compare planar mixing layers with turbulent-box simulations under identical microphysical conditions. Despite identical cooling and turbulent driving, the resulting temperature PDFs differ substantially. The missing ingredient is geometry. We demonstrate that the temperature PDF can be decomposed into the product of the area of temperature isosurfaces and the thickness of the corresponding temperature layers. The thickness is controlled primarily by microphysics, such as radiative cooling and thermal conduction, and is well captured by existing mixing-layer models. The isosurface area, however, is set by morphology. In mixing layers it remains sheet-like, whereas in turbulent media cold gas forms clumps whose interfaces expand with temperature and eventually percolate into connected sheets. This geometric transition produces broad PDFs with large intermediate-temperature mass fractions. These results have implications for long-standing puzzles such as thermally unstable gas in the ISM, the large OVI reservoir in the CGM, and X-ray-H$α$ correlations in jellyfish tails.

AI.tldr: 本文通过对比星际介质（ISM）和星系周介质（CGM）条件下的模拟，揭示了温度概率分布函数（PDF）的差异主要由几何形态（如片状混合层与团块状湍流介质）而非微观物理过程决定，并提出了温度PDF可分解为等温面面积与层厚度的乘积的理论框架。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景或科学主题是探讨多相湍流气体（如星际介质和星系周介质）中温度概率分布函数（PDFs）的形成机制及其与几何形态的关联。
AI.data: 研究中使用的数据来源于在星际介质（ISM）和环星系介质（CGM）条件下进行的3D流体动力学模拟（simulation）。
AI.method: 研究采用三维流体动力学模拟（3D hydrodynamic simulations）比较了平面混合层（planar mixing layers）与湍流盒模拟（turbulent-box simulations）在相同微观物理条件下的温度概率分布函数差异。
AI.result: 温度概率分布函数（PDF）的差异主要由几何形态决定，其中等温面面积由形态控制，而层厚度由微观物理过程控制。

title: A Dynamical Test for Cooling-Induced Entrainment in a Runaway Supermassive Black Hole Tail
comment: 6 Pages, 4 Figures. Comments welcome!
summary: Radiative turbulent mixing layers are widely invoked to explain the survival, growth, and entrainment of cold gas in hot astrophysical flows, but quantitative dynamical tests have remained scarce. RBH-1, the first confirmed runaway supermassive black hole, offers a rare opportunity to test this framework: JWST observations show a 62 kpc tail of cold H$α$ and [O III]-emitting gas behind a source moving at ~950 km/s through the hot circumgalactic medium, with a coherent velocity gradient of ~200 km/s along the tail. Using 3D hydrodynamical simulations together with turbulent mixing-layer theory, we model the coherent downstream tail. We find that the observed downstream deceleration is well reproduced by accretion-induced drag from radiative mixing layers, and that without radiative cooling no coherent cold tail forms. We also derive a direct connection between the tail deceleration and the cooling luminosity, yielding predictions for future measurements of the cooling luminosity profile. RBH-1 therefore provides a rare quantitative dynamical stress test of radiative mixing-layer physics in an astrophysical system.

AI.tldr: 通过对RBH-1（首个确认的失控超大质量黑洞）尾迹的模拟，该研究首次为辐射湍流混合层（radiative turbulent mixing layers）理论提供了定量的动力学验证，证实其能解释冷气体在热流中形成相干尾迹并减速的现象。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景是检验辐射湍流混合层（radiative turbulent mixing layers）理论在解释热天体物理流中冷气体（cold gas）存活、增长和卷吸过程方面的有效性。
AI.data: 使用三维流体动力学模拟（3D hydrodynamical simulations）结合湍流混合层理论（turbulent mixing-layer theory）对下游尾迹进行建模。
AI.method: 采用三维流体动力学模拟结合湍流混合层理论对下游尾迹进行建模。
AI.result: 通过模拟和理论分析发现，观测到的下游减速可由辐射混合层（radiative mixing layer）的吸积诱导阻力很好再现，且若无辐射冷却则无法形成连贯的冷尾流。

title: Resolving circumgalactic gas flows around a z$\approx$3.6 quasar using MUSE and ALMA
comment: Submitted to A&A. 14 pages, 5 figures, 2 appendices
summary: The formation and evolution of galaxies is regulated by the exchange of gas with the surrounding large-scale structures on circum- and intergalactic scales. Yet, little is known about the complex processes shaping the cycle of baryons in and out of galaxies. In this work, we present a multiline study of the gas surrounding a $z\approx3.66$ quasar known to host one of the brightest Ly$α$ nebulae at high redshift, MUSE Quasar Nebula 04 (MQN04). By combining a high-resolution MUSE detection of non-resonant HeII emission with a precise measurement of the redshift of the quasar host via the ALMA CO(4-3) line, we study the kinematics of the cool ionized gas down to $\approx1\rm\,kpc$ from the quasar. The MUSE observations reveal complex clumpy structures as well as diffuse emission extended over $\approx100\,{\rm kpc}$ and blueshifted by $\approx 0-800\,{\rm km\,s^{-1}}$ relative to the quasar systemic redshift, suggesting that the circumgalactic medium is highly asymmetric. The analysis of the HeII/Ly$α$ line ratio, and the presence of a low-column density ($\approx10^{14.6}~\rm cm^{-2}$) HI absorber along the quasar sightline suggests that MQN04 resides in a highly ionized medium. This is also supported by the gas kinematics, which, except in the most central region, shows consistent velocity shifts across the different tracers, indicative of relatively weak radiative transfer effects. Based on its morphology and kinematics, we conclude that the extended HeII emission may arise from merger-driven tidal stripping or inflows of gas illuminated by the quasar radiation. On comoving megaparsec scales, we discover a large concentration ($δ\approx41$) of star-forming galaxies lying within $|Δv_{\rm QSO}| \leq1000\rm\,km\,s^{-1}$ from the quasar. MQN04 is therefore one of the most overdense environments discovered at this epoch.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过对高红移类星体MUSE Quasar Nebula 04（MQN04）的多波段观测，发现其周围存在延展约100千秒差距、速度蓝移约0-800 km/s的高度不对称电离气体晕，并揭示该区域是红移z≈3.66时期已知最密集的星系形成环境之一。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景是星系形成与演化过程中气体与周围大尺度结构（circum- and intergalactic scales）的交换。
AI.data: 研究中使用的观测数据来源于高分辨率MUSE（Multi Unit Spectroscopic Explorer）对非共振HeII发射的探测，以及ALMA（Atacama Large Millimeter/submillimeter Array）对CO(4-3)谱线的精确测量。
AI.method: 采用高分辨率MUSE观测非共振HeII发射线并结合ALMA CO(4-3)线精确测定类星体系统红移，以研究类星体附近约1千秒差距内的冷却电离气体运动学。
AI.result: 该研究通过结合MUSE对非共振HeII发射的高分辨率探测和ALMA对CO(4-3)谱线的精确测量，发现围绕类星体MQN04的冷电离气体存在延伸约100千秒差距、相对类星体系统红移蓝移约0-800公里/秒的复杂团块结构和弥散发射，表明其环星系介质（circumgalactic medium）高度不对称。

title: Secular Brightness Trends of Starlink and OneWeb Satellites
comment: Reviewed by the IAU Center for the Projection of the Dark and Quiet Sky
summary: Magnitudes recorded from 2021 through 2026 for Starlink VisorSats reveal brightening of 0.6 magnitudes, while those of OneWeb show dimming of 0.4. Both trends are significant at 3 sigma. This study is based on 1.6 million magnitudes recorded by the MMT9 robotic observatory.

AI.tldr: 基于MMT9天文台对星链VisorSat和OneWeb卫星的160万次光度测量，研究发现前者在2021至2026年间增亮0.6星等，后者则变暗0.4星等，两者趋势均具有3西格玛（3 sigma）显著性。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景或科学主题是监测低地球轨道（Low Earth Orbit, LEO）卫星星座（如Starlink和OneWeb）的长期亮度变化及其对天文观测的影响。
AI.data: 本研究基于MMT9机器人天文台记录的160万条星等（magnitude）数据。
AI.method: 基于MMT9机器人天文台记录的160万条星等数据进行分析。
AI.result: 基于160万次MMT9天文台观测数据，星链（Starlink）VisorSat卫星在2021至2026年间增亮0.6星等，而一网（OneWeb）卫星则变暗0.4星等，两者趋势均具有3西格玛（3 sigma）显著性。

title: Into the Gompverse: A robust Gompertzian reionization model for CMB analyses
comment: 8 figures. Comments welcome!
summary: Cosmic reionization is driven by the formation of sources of ultraviolet photons, and hence it is an intrinsically asymmetric process, where its earlier stages occur at a slower pace relative to its later stages. Yet most modern cosmic microwave background (CMB) analyses rely on a hyperbolic tangent template, i.e. a symmetric sigmoid, that is not well suited for joint fitting of CMB and reionization observations. In this work, we introduce a physically motivated Gompertzian reionization model with three astrophysical (nuisance) parameters, designed to enable joint analyses of CMB and reionization data and to be applicable to a wide range of datasets and cosmological models. This robust Gompertzian model leverages the connection between cosmology and reionization, typically ignored in standard CMB analyses, to demote the optical depth ($τ_{\rm reio}$) to derived parameter, reducing its uncertainty by approximately a factor of three compared to the conventional $\tanh$ prescription. The $τ_{\rm reio}$ improvement enables tighter constraints on the sum of the neutrino masses, revealing potential tension with neutrino oscillation experiments even after accounting for the known relaxation of neutrino mass bounds in $w_0w_a$CDM models -- a tension that is partially obscured by the conventional treatment of reionization. In addition, the inferred constraints on the astrophysical parameters governing reionization naturally synergize with current and upcoming 21 cm experiments, providing physically informed parameter ranges for future 21 cm studies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种物理驱动的戈珀兹（Gompertz）再电离模型，通过将光学深度（$τ_{\rm reio}$）降为导出参数并将其不确定性降低约三倍，从而在联合分析宇宙微波背景（CMB）与再电离数据时，能更精确地约束中微子质量总和并揭示其与振荡实验的潜在张力，同时为21厘米实验提供物理信息参数范围。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景或科学主题是宇宙再电离（cosmic reionization）的物理建模及其与宇宙微波背景（CMB）观测的联合分析。
AI.data: 本研究使用宇宙微波背景（CMB）观测数据与再电离（reionization）数据（包括当前及未来的21厘米实验数据）进行联合分析。
AI.method: 该研究引入了一种基于物理动机的戈珀兹（Gompertzian）再电离模型，其包含三个天体物理（冗余）参数，旨在支持宇宙微波背景（CMB）与再电离数据的联合分析，并适用于广泛的数据集和宇宙学模型。
AI.result: 该研究引入的戈姆珀茨（Gompertz）再电离模型将光学深度（τ_reio）降格为导出参数，使其不确定性相比传统双曲正切（tanh）模型降低约三倍，从而能更严格地约束中微子质量总和，并揭示其与中微子振荡实验间的潜在张力。

title: Investigating the Circumgalactic Medium through Mg II absorption coincidence
comment: Accepted for publication in MNRAS
summary: We present a statistical measurement of the transverse coherence of Mg II $λ\lambda2796,2803$ absorption using a large sample of 9204 absorber-centric quasar sightline pairs from the Sloan Digital Sky Survey. We quantify the probability that an Mg II absorber detected along one sightline is also present along a nearby sightline, and measure how this coincidence probability varies with projected separation from $\sim$50 kpc to $\sim$1 Mpc. The resulting coincidence curve exhibits a clear two-regime structure: the coincidence probability rises steeply to $\sim$5-8% at separations below $\sim$100 kpc, but declines rapidly beyond this scale and settles into a low plateau of $\sim$1--2% out to $\sim$1 Mpc. A simple geometrical single-halo model reproduces the enhanced probability at $\lesssim$100 kpc, while the large-scale plateau is well explained by the expected contribution from galaxy clustering, confirmed using both photometric galaxy counts and the two-point correlation function. A complementary stacking analysis reveals a significant excess in Mg II equivalent width in paired sightlines lacking individual detections, implying a coherence scale of $\sim$100-200 kpc for the cool, metal-enriched CGM. Together, these results identify the transition from a halo-dominated coherence regime at small separations to a clustering-dominated regime at large scales, bridging the gap between small-scale lensing constraints and megaparsec-scale absorber clustering studies.

AI.tldr: 基于对9204个类星体Mg II吸收体对（Mg II absorber）的统计分析，该研究发现其横向相干性在约100千秒差距（kpc）以下由单晕（single-halo）模型主导，而在更大尺度上则转为星系成团（galaxy clustering）主导，揭示了富金属冷环星系介质（CGM）的相干尺度约为100-200千秒差距。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景是探索星系晕（halo）和星系际介质中金属富集冷气体（cool, metal-enriched CGM）的空间分布与横向相干性。
AI.data: 研究使用的数据来源于斯隆数字巡天（Sloan Digital Sky Survey）中的9204个以吸收体为中心的类星体视线对样本。
AI.method: 采用统计测量方法分析吸收体横向相干性，包括巧合概率曲线拟合、单晕（single-halo）几何模型与星系聚类贡献的对比，并通过叠加（stacking）分析验证金属富集冷气体晕（CGM）的相干尺度。
AI.result: 该研究发现Mg II吸收体横向相干性随投影距离呈现双区结构：在小于约100千秒差距（kpc）的尺度上相干概率显著升高至约5-8%，而在更大尺度上则迅速下降并维持在约1-2%的低平台水平。

title: An Information-Theoretic Metric for Transient Classification and Novelty Detection
comment: 14 pages, 7 figures, submitting to ApJS
summary: The development of the observing strategy for the Vera C. Rubin Observatory Legacy Survey of Space and Time (LSST) requires a broad optimization across science cases inside and outside of time-domain astronomy. We introduce a novel metric for transient science with LSST based on information-theoretic cross-entropy. We demonstrate its utility for distinguishing populations of objects and discuss applications for observing strategy / detection pipeline optimization as well as novelty detection and follow-up resource allocation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于信息论交叉熵的新指标（metric），用于优化LSST（Vera C. Rubin Observatory Legacy Survey of Space and Time）的瞬变源（transient）观测策略，并展示了其在区分天体种群、优化观测与探测流程以及分配后续观测资源方面的应用价值。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景是优化薇拉·C·鲁宾天文台时空遗产巡天（LSST）的观测策略以兼顾时域天文学内外的多种科学目标。
AI.data: 该研究使用了基于信息论交叉熵的新型度量方法，并讨论了其在观测策略优化、检测流程优化以及新奇天体发现和后续资源分配中的应用。
AI.method: 本研究采用了一种基于信息论交叉熵（cross-entropy）的新型度量方法。
AI.result: 该研究引入了一种基于信息论交叉熵（cross-entropy）的新颖度量方法，用于优化LSST瞬变科学（transient science）的观测策略和检测流程。

title: Double the axions, half the tension: multi-field early dark energy eases the Hubble tension
comment: 4pages, 4figures + appendix (2 pages, 4 figures). Comments welcome!
summary: We show that the strong constraints placed by Planck NPIPE Cosmic Microwave Background (CMB) data on axion-like early dark energy (EDE) are significantly alleviated in models with multiple fields. We find a $1.5σ$ residual tension with the Local Distance Network value of $H_0$ in a 2-field model, with no improvement beyond two fields, and a best-fit value of $H_0$ $\sim 1.4σ$ larger than in the 1-field case. The second field improves the fit to high-$\ell$ CMB data, where 1-field EDE is most strongly disfavored, and suggests modifications to the pre-recombination history over a wider redshift range.

AI.tldr: 多场模型（multiple fields）显著缓解了普朗克NPIPE宇宙微波背景（CMB）数据对类轴子早期暗能量（EDE）的强约束，其中两场模型将哈勃常数（H_0）的局域测量值残余张力降至1.5σ，并通过改善高角多极矩（high-ℓ）CMB数据拟合度，表明前复合期历史在更宽红移范围内存在修正。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景或科学主题是探索多场模型（multiple fields）对缓解早期暗能量（axion-like early dark energy, EDE）与宇宙微波背景（CMB）观测之间紧张关系的潜在作用。
AI.data: 研究使用了普朗克卫星NPIPE处理发布的宇宙微波背景（CMB）观测数据。
AI.method: 采用多场模型分析早期暗能量（EDE）对宇宙微波背景（CMB）数据的影响。
AI.result: 多场模型显著缓解了普朗克NPIPE宇宙微波背景（CMB）数据对类轴子早期暗能量（EDE）的强约束。

title: Euclid: Quick Data Release (Q1) -- Dual AGN in low-mass galaxies
comment: Accepted for publication in A&A
summary: Dual active galactic nuclei (AGNs) are expected in hierarchical galaxy evolution models, in which low-mass galaxies merge to build more massive ones. While observational evidence for dual AGNs is growing in massive galaxies, no clear detection has yet been found in the low-mass regime. We used photometry and spectroscopy from the first \Euclid Quick Data Release, combined with a collection of multi-wavelength data from the Dark Energy Spectroscopic Instrument (DESI), the LOw-Frequency ARray (LOFAR) high band antenna, and counterparts in X-ray and mid-infrared catalogues to identify dual AGNs at redshift $z \lesssim 1$. Focusing on low-mass galaxies with stellar masses below 10$^{10}$ M$_{\odot}$, we find nine dual AGN candidates with projected separations ranging from $\sim$20 to 51 kpc. We also find 49 dual AGN candidates in more massive galaxies. We derive a dual AGN fraction of 0.1\% for the low-mass galaxies and estimate that these systems likely trace a population of progenitor black hole pairs that may evolve into bound binaries and eventually coalesce, emitting gravitational waves in the LISA band. These results constitute the first sample of spectroscopically confirmed dual AGN candidates in low-mass galaxies and have important implications for models in which supermassive black holes grow from lower-mass black holes located in low-mass galaxies, as well as for predictions of gravitational waves from low-mass binary black holes.

AI.tldr: 该研究利用多波段数据首次在低质量（stellar mass < 10¹⁰ M☉）星系中发现了9个光谱证实的双活动星系核（dual AGN）候选体，其投影距离为20-51千秒差距，并得出低质量星系的双活动星系核比例为0.1%，这为黑洞由低质量星系中的小黑洞合并增长以及低频引力波预测提供了依据。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景或科学主题是探索低质量星系中双活动星系核（dual AGNs）的存在及其在星系演化、超大质量黑洞（supermassive black holes）形成和引力波（gravitational waves）源预测中的意义。
AI.data: 研究使用了来自欧几里得望远镜（Euclid）快速数据发布的光度测量和光谱数据，并结合了暗能量光谱仪（DESI）、低频阵列高波段天线（LOFAR）以及X射线和中红外星表中的多波长数据。
AI.method: 研究结合了欧几里得（Euclid）快速数据发布的光度与光谱数据、暗能量光谱仪（DESI）的多波段数据、低频阵列（LOFAR）高波段天线数据以及X射线和中红外目录的对应数据，以识别红移$z \lesssim 1$的双活动星系核（AGNs）。
AI.result: 该研究首次在低质量星系中发现了九个光谱证实的双活动星系核（dual AGN）候选体，其投影分离范围约为20至51千秒差距。

title: Site Quality Analysis for an Indian Submillimeter Telescope: A Reanalysis-Based Approach
comment: 14 pages, 9 figures, Accepted in Astronomical Journal(AJ)
summary: The Himalayan plateau region of Ladakh, India, is a potential host for a science-class submillimeter observatory, building on existing astronomical infrastructure near Hanle and Merak. Using the fifth-generation European Centre for Medium-Range Weather Forecasts (ECMWF) Reanalysis (ERA5) data, we analyze precipitable water vapor (PWV) at monthly resolution over 184 months from January 2010 to April 2025, map PWV statistics across Ladakh, and identify candidate regions that reach PWV $\leq 1$ mm. For promising locations, we compute atmospheric transmittance and the corresponding atmospheric photon noise using the am (Atmospheric Model) radiative transfer code; we present transmittance and brightness temperature estimates over 10--1000 GHz and compare the inferred performance to sites hosting current or planned submillimeter facilities worldwide. We find Ladakh to be favorable for submillimeter observations, with multiple ERA5 grid cells reaching PWV $\leq 1$ mm. Within ERA5's spatial resolution, two regions emerge as particularly promising: Site A ($\approx 34.25^\circ$N, $78.75^\circ$E) and Site B ($\approx 32.50^\circ$N, $79.00^\circ$E), which satisfy PWV $\leq 1$ mm for about 23% and 19% of the study duration, respectively, compared to about 5% and 8% for the Hanle and Merak grid cells. These results motivate targeted in situ radiometer measurements for final site selection.

AI.tldr: 基于再分析数据（ERA5）对印度拉达克地区可沉降水汽（PWV）的分析，识别出两个亚毫米波观测潜力优于现有台址的新候选区域（Site A与Site B），其PWV ≤ 1毫米的时间占比分别达约23%和19%。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景是评估印度拉达克喜马拉雅高原地区作为亚毫米波天文台候选站址的潜力，这属于天文台址选址与表征（site characterization）的科学主题。
AI.data: 研究使用了欧洲中期天气预报中心第五代再分析（ERA5）数据，分析了从2010年1月至2025年4月共184个月、月分辨率的可降水量（PWV）。
AI.method: 采用欧洲中期天气预报中心第五代再分析数据（ERA5）分析可降水量（PWV），并利用大气辐射传输模型（am）计算大气透射率和相应的大气光子噪声。
AI.result: 基于ERA5再分析数据，在拉达克（Ladakh）识别出两个特别有前景的候选区域（Site A和Site B），其可沉降水汽（PWV）≤1毫米的时间占比分别约为23%和19%，显著高于现有天文台址汉勒（Hanle）和梅拉克（Merak）的约5%和8%。

title: Reconstructing inflationary features on large scales using genetic algorithm
comment: 23 pages, 11 figures
summary: [Abridged] A variety of model-dependent as well as model-independent approaches suggest that certain localized features in the primordial scalar power spectrum can lead to a significantly better fit to the observed anisotropies in the cosmic microwave background (CMB). In this work, we focus on three types of such features and examine whether these features can be generated in inflationary scenarios driven by a single, canonical scalar field. We consider a slowly rolling baseline model that is described by a specific time-dependence of the first slow roll parameter and we generate the desired features in the power spectrum through suitable modifications to the functional form of the slow roll parameter. To systematically reconstruct the desired features in the scalar power spectrum (or, equivalently, the modifications in the behavior of the first slow roll parameter) that are consistent with the data, we implement a machine learning pipeline based on the genetic algorithm (GA). Assuming the standard values for the background $Λ$CDM model (arrived at for a nearly scale-invariant primordial scalar power spectrum), we apply our method to the Planck 2018 CMB data, and show that the reconstructed features improve the fit to the observed angular power spectra by $Δχ^2 \lesssim -10$. Moreover, we find that GA points to other sets of background parameters and primordial features, which lead to a similar level of improvement in the fit to the data. Such alternative sets of background parameters and scalar power spectra offer possible pathways to alleviate existing cosmological tensions. Our approach provides effective single-field inflationary dynamics to generate features that are supported by the data.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过基于遗传算法（GA）的机器学习流程，在单一场正则标量场（canonical scalar field）驱动暴胀模型中系统重构了与普朗克（Planck）2018宇宙微波背景（CMB）数据一致的原初标量功率谱局部特征，发现这些特征可将角功率谱拟合优度提升Δχ²≲-10，并指出替代的背景参数与功率谱特征组合可能有助于缓解现有宇宙学张力。
AI.background: 该研究聚焦于通过修改慢滚参数（slow roll parameter）在单一场暴胀（inflationary）模型中生成原初标量功率谱（primordial scalar power spectrum）的局域化特征（localized features），以更好地拟合宇宙微波背景（cosmic microwave background, CMB）观测数据。
AI.data: 该研究使用了普朗克卫星2018年发布的宇宙微波背景（CMB）各向异性观测数据。
AI.method: 该研究采用基于遗传算法（genetic algorithm，GA）的机器学习流程，通过系统性地重构与数据一致的标量功率谱特征（即对第一慢滚参数行为的修改）来实现分析。
AI.result: 基于遗传算法（GA）重建的原初标量功率谱（primordial scalar power spectrum）特征能显著改善与普朗克（Planck）2018年宇宙微波背景（CMB）观测数据的拟合度（Δχ² ≲ -10），并可能为缓解现有宇宙学张力提供途径。

title: Targeted search for eccentric supermassive binary black holes in OJ 287 and nearby galaxy clusters with PPTA DR3
comment: Accepted for publication in Chinese Physics Letters; 13 pages, 6 figures, 3 tables
summary: We perform Bayesian targeted searches for continuous gravitational waves from eccentric supermassive binary black holes (SMBBHs) using the Parkes Pulsar Timing Array third data release (PPTA DR3). Six electromagnetically motivated sky directions are analyzed, including the blazar OJ~287 and five nearby galaxy clusters (Virgo, Fornax, Norma, Hercules, and Coma). No significant signals are found. For OJ 287, by explicitly incorporating orbital eccentricity (up to $e_0 = 0.8$) to robustly capture signal power spread across multiple harmonics, we constrain the total binary mass to $M_{\rm tot} < 5.25 \times 10^{10} M_{\odot}$ (95\% credible level). We also place upper limits on the chirp mass of potential SMBBHs residing in galaxy clusters. By combining these limits with independent black hole mass estimates, we place novel constraints on the allowed binary mass ratios for potential hosts such as M87 and NGC~4889. Specifically, our results exclude binaries with mass ratios $q \gtrsim 10^{-2}$ at around 10 nHz for these massive systems, effectively ruling out equal-mass black hole mergers in the sampled parameter space. These findings demonstrate the growing power of pulsar timing arrays to probe SMBBH populations.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过对OJ 287等六个目标方向进行贝叶斯搜索，未发现显著连续引力波信号，并首次利用脉冲星计时阵列数据结合轨道偏心率，对超大质量双黑洞（SMBBHs）的总质量（如OJ 287处小于5.25×10¹⁰ M⊙）和质量比（如排除M87和NGC 4889中q≳10⁻²的等质量系统）给出了新的观测约束。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景或科学主题是利用脉冲星计时阵列（PTA）对超大质量双黑洞（SMBBH）产生的连续引力波进行探测，以研究宇宙中的超大质量黑洞并合现象与星系演化。
AI.data: 研究使用的数据来自帕克斯脉冲星计时阵列第三次数据发布（PPTA DR3）。
AI.method: 采用贝叶斯定向搜索（Bayesian targeted searches）方法，并显式纳入轨道偏心率以稳健捕获分布在多个谐波上的信号功率。
AI.result: 基于PPTA DR3数据对OJ 287等目标进行贝叶斯搜索，未发现显著连续引力波信号，但对OJ 287的总质量给出了严格上限（$M_{\rm tot} < 5.25 \times 10^{10} M_{\odot}$，95%置信水平），并对M87等星系中潜在超大质量双黑洞（SMBBH）的质量比（$q$）设定了新约束，排除了参数空间中质量比$q \gtrsim 10^{-2}$（约10 nHz处）的等质量双黑洞并合。

title: Simulation of non X-ray background for the DIffuse X-ray Explorer (DIXE) mission
summary: DIffuse X-ray Explorer (DIXE) is a proposed high-resolution spectroscopic survey mission onboard the China Space Station. Equipped with microcalorimeters based on the Transition-edge sensor technology, it aims to survey the hot gas in the Milky Way. The performance of DIXE depends on the understanding of non X-ray background (NXB), which can strongly affect observations of diffuse X-ray emission. In this work, we simulated the NXB of DIXE in a low-earth orbit (LEO) using \textsc{Geant4}. A detailed mass model of the payload was constructed, and the major sources of NXB were identified, including cosmic rays, albedo neutrons and albedo photons. These components were implemented in \textsc{Geant4} with realistic angular and spectral distributions. We simulated the relevant physical processes of space radiation interacting with the instrument and calculated the resulting NXB. We also evaluated the delayed background from trapped protons in the South Atlantic Anomaly (SAA). Our simulations show that, at the geomagnetic equator and under solar minimum conditions, the NXB is on average $4.46 \times 10^{-2} ~\mathrm{counts~s^{-1}~cm^{-2}~keV^{-1}}$ in 0.1--10 keV energy band, with dominant contributions from the induced particles generated by primary cosmic protons. The NXB increases toward higher geomagnetic latitudes, reaching a maximum of $1.55 \times 10^{-1} ~\mathrm{counts~s^{-1}~cm^{-2}~keV^{-1}}$. The delayed background induced by the SAA decays rapidly after exiting the anomaly and becomes negligible within approximately 5 minutes. The simulated NXB is consistent with that of similar X-ray observatories in LEOs.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过Geant4模拟明确了中国空间站拟搭载的弥散X射线探测仪（DIXE）在低地球轨道（LEO）的非X射线背景（NXB）主要源于初级宇宙线质子诱发的次级粒子，其在0.1–10 keV能段的平均强度为$4.46 \times 10^{-2} ~\mathrm{counts~s^{-1}~cm^{-2}~keV^{-1}}$，并随纬度升高而增强，而南大西洋异常区（SAA）诱发的延迟背景在离开异常区约5分钟后可忽略。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景或主题是评估低地球轨道（LEO）中DIffuse X-ray Explorer (DIXE)项目的非X射线背景（NXB），以支持其利用过渡边缘传感器（TES）微热量计对银河系热气体进行高分辨率光谱巡天的科学目标。
AI.data: 研究使用\textsc{Geant4}软件模拟了低地球轨道（LEO）环境下的非X射线背景（NXB），并构建了有效载荷的详细质量模型，主要背景源包括宇宙射线、反照中子和反照光子，同时评估了南大西洋异常区（SAA）捕获质子产生的延迟背景。
AI.method: 采用Geant4软件模拟了低地球轨道（LEO）环境下的非X射线背景（NXB），并构建了有效载荷的详细质量模型，同时评估了南大西洋异常区（SAA）俘获质子产生的延迟本底。
AI.result: 模拟结果表明，在0.1-10 keV能段，地磁赤道处非X射线背景（NXB）平均强度为$4.46 \times 10^{-2} ~\mathrm{counts~s^{-1}~cm^{-2}~keV^{-1}}$，其主要来源是初级宇宙线质子产生的次级粒子。

title: Reanalysing large-scale structure using an updated gamma-ray burst spatial density approach
comment: submitted
summary: In the past few decades, large universal structures have been found that challenge the homogeneity and isotropy expected in standard cosmological models. This study examines burst clustering in both galactic hemispheres using a recently developed methodology, using spheres in 3D space for testing regularities. Using our new method in both hemisphere we find only one deviation from isotropy. A small one in the Southern and a huge one in the Northern hemisphere. This itself suggests that the two deviations do not likely to come from statistical fluctuation. The northern huge group contains app. 125 gamma-ray bursts (GRBs) corresponds with the so - called Hercules-Corona Borealis Great Wall. The southern group contains 4-5 GRBs locating very close to each other. Two of them (GRB050822 and GRB050318) are close not just in redshift and the angular position but they are very close in observing time (5 months). We concluded that the third important result of this work that this method could not find other overdensity deviation from homogeneity in the GRBs spatial distribution. We have shown that the large-scale density increase in the spatial distribution of gamma-ray bursts does not necessarily violate the cosmological principle.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过新方法在伽马射线暴（GRB）空间分布中检测到南北半球各一个偏离各向同性的区域，其中北半球巨大区域（约125个GRB）对应武仙-北冕座长城，而南半球小区域（4-5个GRB）的紧密聚集未显著违背宇宙学原理。
AI.background: 该研究探讨了宇宙大尺度结构（large universal structures）对标准宇宙学模型所预期的均匀性和各向同性（homogeneity and isotropy）的挑战。
AI.data: 本研究使用伽马射线暴（GRB）的观测数据，通过分析其在南北半球天区的空间分布来检验各向同性。
AI.method: 本研究采用在三维空间中使用球体测试规律性的新方法（a recently developed methodology using spheres in 3D space for testing regularities）来分析伽马射线暴（GRBs）的空间分布。
AI.result: 使用新方法在南北半球仅发现各一处偏离各向同性的伽马暴（GRB）聚类，其中北半球巨大聚类（约125个伽马暴）对应武仙-北冕座长城，南半球微小聚类（4-5个伽马暴）中GRB050822与GRB050318在红移、角位置及观测时间（相隔5个月）上均极为接近。

title: 4MOST ChANGES: Catalog of high-redshift quasar candidates (4.5 < $z$ < 7) selected with SED fitting
comment: 12 pages, 11 figures, 4 tables, accepted for publication in Astronomy & Astrophysics (A&A)
summary: The identification of high-redshift quasars ($z > 4.5$) is critical for studying the early Universe, supermassive black hole growth, and cosmic reionization. Most known high-redshift quasars are located in the northern hemisphere, leaving the southern sky largely unexplored. As part of the 4-meter Multi-Object Spectroscopic Telescope (4MOST) and Chilean AGN/Galaxy Extragalactic Survey (ChANGES) S1604 survey, we aim to create a large catalog of high-redshift quasar candidates in the southern hemisphere using multiwavelength photometry and Spectral Energy Distribution (SED) fitting, with the goal of spectroscopic follow-up with 4MOST. We construct a multi-band photometric catalog by combining optical data from DELVE DR2 and DECaLS DR10, near-infrared data from VHS DR5 with an additional field of VIKING, mid-infrared data from AllWISE, and optical astrometry from Gaia DR3. After applying morphological and color-based cuts, we perform SED fitting using quasar and brown dwarf templates. Statistical outputs, including $χ^2$, BIC, and F-test are used to rank and select candidates. Our final catalog contains 6104 high-redshift quasar candidates within $4.5 < z < 7$, with detections in 7 or more photometric bands satisfying our SED-based selection criteria (BIC > 0 and F-test > 10). Spectroscopic validation using NTT/EFOSC2 and Palomar/NGPS confirmed 3 high-redshift quasars at $z > 5$ out of 6 observed candidates.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过结合多波段测光数据与光谱能量分布（SED）拟合方法，首次在南方天区构建了一个包含6104个高红移（$4.5 < z < 7$）类星体候选者的星表，并通过光谱观测成功确认了其中3个红移大于5的类星体。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景是探索早期宇宙、研究超大质量黑洞（Supermassive Black Hole）的增长以及宇宙再电离（cosmic reionization）过程。
AI.data: 研究使用的数据来源包括：光学数据来自DELVE DR2和DECaLS DR10，近红外数据来自VHS DR5及额外的VIKING天区，中红外数据来自AllWISE，光学天体测量数据来自Gaia DR3。
AI.method: 本研究采用的核心分析方法是结合类星体和褐矮星模板进行能谱分布（SED）拟合，并利用包括卡方（$χ^2$）、贝叶斯信息准则（BIC）和F检验在内的统计输出来对候选体进行排序与筛选。
AI.result: 通过多波段测光与光谱能量分布拟合，在4.5 < z < 7范围内筛选出6104个高红移（high-redshift）类星体候选体，其中已观测的6个候选体中有3个在红移大于5处得到光谱确认。

title: The 256-antenna Coherent All-Sky Monitor
summary: Radio astronomy is uniquely coupled to exponential trends in computation because the optics (cross-correlation, beamforming, and imaging) and spectrometry (i.e. channelization) can now be done digitally. Inexpensive analog-to-digital converters (ADCs) can sample signals from large numbers of antennas and graphics processing units (GPUs) allow us to coherently process wide-field radio data in real time, motivating large-$N$ aperture arrays at moderate cost. We describe the 256-antenna Coherent All-Sky Monitor (CASM-256), a dense aperture array operating at 375-500\,MHz, currently being deployed at the Owens Valley Radio Observatory (OVRO) in Big Pine, California. The large field-of-view (FoV$\sim10^4$\,deg$^2$) and point-source sensitivity of CASM-256 will allow it to detect local Universe fast radio bursts (FRBs). The nearby sample is ideal for unveiling the physical origin of FRBs, measuring the baryonic content of nearby galaxy halos, and discovering prompt multi-wavelength and multi-messenger counterparts to FRBs. CASM will search for fast transients in the Milky Way such as FRB analogs, pulsar giant pulses, and the new source class known as long-period radio transients. We describe the instrument and present on-sky data from the first two dozen antennas, including an operational real-time GPU based FRB search pipeline. We emphasize the scalability of the concept and describe paths to a future CASM array with tens of thousands of antennas that could detect one million FRBs.

AI.tldr: 该研究介绍了正在部署的256天线相干全天监测器（CASM-256），这是一个工作于375-500 MHz的密集孔径阵列，其大视场和高灵敏度旨在探测邻近宇宙的快速射电暴（FRBs）及银河系内的快速暂现源，并展示了基于GPU的实时探测流水线，为未来扩展到数万天线规模奠定了基础。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景是数字信号处理技术进步推动射电天文学（radio astronomy）向大数量天线（large-$N$ aperture arrays）和实时宽视场观测发展，以探测宇宙中的快速射电暴（fast radio bursts, FRBs）等快速瞬变现象。
AI.data: 该研究使用的观测数据来自部署于加州大松镇欧文斯谷射电天文台（Owens Valley Radio Observatory, OVRO）的256天线相干全天监测器（Coherent All-Sky Monitor, CASM-256），并已利用首批部署的二十余个天线获取了实测数据。
AI.method: 核心分析方法、物理模型或技术手段包括使用图形处理器（GPU）进行实时相干处理，并部署基于GPU的快速射电暴（FRB）实时搜索管线。
AI.result: 该研究描述了一种正在部署的256天线相干全天空监测器（CASM-256），这是一种工作在375-500 MHz频段的密集孔径阵列，其大视场和高点源灵敏度将使其能够探测到本地宇宙的快速射电暴（FRBs）。

title: Optical depth to reionization in a Universe with multiple inhomogeneous domains
comment: 20 pages, 8 figures
summary: We study the optical depth to reionization in a cosmological setting that includes backreaction from matter inhomogeneities, using the Buchert averaging formalism. We construct a spacetime model consisting of multiple inhomogeneous domains, hereafter referred to as the backreaction model, characterized by a set of parameters. We first examine how these parameters influence the computation of the optical depth to reionization, $τ_{reion}$. Next, we carry out a Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) analysis based on the PantheonPlus+SH0ES Type Ia supernova sample to infer the best-fit values of the model parameters, and then use these to evaluate $τ_{reion}$. We obtain $τ_{reion} = 0.0581^{+0.0105}_{-0.0096}$ (68$\%$ confidence limits). This result indicates that, when PantheonPlus+SH0ES data are used to constrain the model parameters, our backreaction model yields a value of $τ_{reion}$ that aligns more closely with observational estimates than the value predicted by the standard cosmological model. We further demonstrate that the backreaction model leads to a modest reduction of the Hubble tension, while avoiding the need for exotic or non-standard physics.

AI.tldr: 基于PantheonPlus+SH0ES数据对包含物质不均匀性反作用（backreaction）的宇宙学模型进行参数约束后，计算得出的再电离光学深度（τ_reion）为0.0581^{+0.0105}_{-0.0096}，该结果比标准宇宙学模型的预测值更符合观测估计，同时能在无需引入非标准物理的情况下适度缓解哈勃张力。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景是宇宙再电离（reionization）的光深（optical depth）在包含物质不均匀性反作用（backreaction）的宇宙学框架下的计算与约束。
AI.data: 研究基于PantheonPlus+SH0ES Ia型超新星样本进行了马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛（MCMC）分析以推断模型参数。
AI.method: 采用Buchert平均形式主义构建包含多重非均匀域的后反应模型，并基于PantheonPlus+SH0ES Ia型超新星样本进行马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛（MCMC）分析以推断模型参数。
AI.result: 基于PantheonPlus+SH0ES数据对模型参数进行约束后，该反作用模型得出的再电离光学深度（τ_reion）值（0.0581^{+0.0105}_{-0.0096}）比标准宇宙学模型的预测值更接近观测估计值。

title: Galactic Rain: Cool Gas Inflows in Red Geyser Galaxies and Their Connection to AGN Activity and Interactions
comment: 23 pages, 22 figures, 2 tables. Accepted for publication in ApJ
summary: Red geysers are a population of massive (log[M/M$_\odot$]~10.5), quiescent galaxies that exhibit large-scale but weak, bi-symmetric ionized gas outflows, interpreted as signatures of ongoing, low-level active galactic nucleus (AGN) feedback. We investigate the kinematics and prevalence of cool (T~100-1000K), neutral gas traced by Na I D absorption, and its connection to galaxy environment and AGN activity. Using 140 red geyser galaxies from the Sloan Digital Sky Survey-IV Mapping Nearby Galaxies at Apache Point Observatory (MaNGA), we measure spatially resolved velocities and dispersions via double-Gaussian fits to the Na I D doublet. We find that ~70% of the cool gas is inflowing, with a median velocity of ~47 km/s (~10% of the expected free-fall speed), and also exhibits kinematically ordered motions with $σ_{NaD}$/${σ_*}$~0.4. Additionally, the Na I D absorption is more prevalent in red geysers than in a matched control sample, showing a higher detection fraction (63% vs 40%) and reservoir areas ~1.6 times larger. Acceleration (~1 Myr) and accretion (~20 Myr) timescales indicate that the absorbing clouds are likely young and short-lived. Another intriguing result is that radio-detected red geysers (30% of the sample) show inflowing gas reservoirs ~7 times larger than in non-radio systems. Similarly, galaxies subject to environmental effects host inflowing gas reservoirs ~2.7 times larger than isolated red geysers. We take this as evidence that galaxy interactions play a key role in replenishing the cool gas reservoirs of red geysers, fueling central AGN activity, sustaining radio emission, and regulating long-term quiescence. These findings reveal that quiescent systems are governed by cycles of inflow, feedback, and regulation.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过对红喷流星系（red geysers）中性钠吸收（Na I D）的观测，发现其中约70%的冷气体以约47 km/s的速度流入，且流入气体规模在射电探测或受环境影响的星系中显著更大，表明星系相互作用通过补充冷气体、激发活动星系核（AGN）反馈来维持长期宁静状态。
AI.background: 该研究聚焦于红喷流星系（red geysers）中低水平活动星系核（AGN）反馈对冷气体吸积与流出的调控作用及其与星系环境和射电活动的关联。
AI.data: 研究使用的数据来源于斯隆数字巡天第四期（Sloan Digital Sky Survey-IV）的“阿帕奇点天文台附近星系测绘”（Mapping Nearby Galaxies at Apache Point Observatory，MaNGA）项目，具体为其中的140个红色间歇泉（red geyser）星系样本。
AI.method: 研究采用双高斯拟合（double-Gaussian fits）方法对Na I D双线进行空间分辨的速度和弥散测量。
AI.result: 研究发现红色间歇泉星系（red geysers）中约70%的冷中性气体（通过Na I D吸收示踪）以约47 km/s的中位速度流入，且其吸收比匹配对照样本更普遍（探测比例63%对40%，储层面积大1.6倍）。

title: Visplot: A visibility plot and observation scheduling tool for astronomical observatories
comment: 12 pages, 3 figures, 3 tables, submitted to A&A
summary: We present Visplot, a free, open-source, web-based tool for hardware-aware visibility analysis and heuristic scheduling of both sidereal and non-sidereal astronomical observations. Visplot computes visibility windows as finite unions of disjoint intervals by intersecting user-defined constraints. This framework natively incorporates celestial parameters (airmass, moon distance, twilight), mechanical telescope boundaries (altitude and hour-angle limits), and custom temporal restrictions defined in UTC or Local Sidereal Time, allowing for a high degree of scheduling flexibility. The scheduling engine combines deterministic pre-allocation for mandatory targets with a multi-objective heuristic optimization of the remaining target pool, balancing scientific priority, target urgency, altitude, and telescope slew overhead. Originally developed to address an operational need for flexible and lightweight scheduling support at the Nordic Optical Telescope (NOT) in La Palma, Visplot has been in continuous use since 2016. Its nearly decade-long operational history, together with routine use by astronomers at multiple observatories worldwide, demonstrates its practical value in real-world observational workflows. Its client-side, zero-installation architecture facilitates real-time schedule refinement, making it particularly suited for time-domain triggers (e.g., GRB/GW alerts) and geographically distributed remote observing. A user survey indicates that the tool significantly reduces the cognitive overhead of nightly planning while ensuring that generated schedules remain strictly within the mechanical and operational limits of the telescope hardware. Visplot provides a robust, lightweight alternative to monolithic scheduling suites, supporting the practical needs of modern PI-led observatories.

AI.tldr: 该研究开发了Visplot这一开源、基于Web的天文观测可视性分析与调度工具，通过整合天体、机械及自定义约束，结合确定性预分配与多目标启发式优化，为包括非恒星目标在内的观测提供了灵活、轻量级的调度支持，显著降低了观测规划负担并确保符合望远镜硬件限制。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景或科学主题是开发用于天文观测的硬件感知可见性分析与启发式调度工具。
AI.data: 该工具的数据来源于用户自定义的约束条件（如天顶距、月距、晨昏蒙影等天体参数，望远镜的机械边界，以及自定义的UTC或本地恒星时限制），这些约束的交集被用于计算可见性窗口。
AI.method: 该工具采用基于用户定义约束的交集计算可见性窗口（visibility windows）作为有限个不相交区间的并集，并结合确定性预分配与多目标启发式优化（multi-objective heuristic optimization）的调度引擎。
AI.result: Visplot是一款免费、开源、基于Web的工具，用于进行硬件感知的可见性分析及对恒星与非恒星（sidereal and non-sidereal）天文观测的启发式调度。

title: Denoising clustering covariance matrices with Rotational Invariant Estimators
summary: Cosmological parameter inference from galaxy clustering relies critically on accurate estimates of the covariance and precision matrices. These are often obtained from a limited number of mock catalogs, introducing noise and bias in the precision matrix when the data-vector dimension becomes comparable to the number of available realizations. We present the first application of the Rotational Invariant Estimator (RIE) to the large-scale clustering of galaxies, benchmarking it against the standard sample covariance and the non-linear shrinkage estimator NERCOME for both the two-point correlation function (2PCF) and power spectrum. Using controlled synthetic data sets with analytically known covariance matrices, we estimate the covariance with all three methods across a range of mock-to-dimension ratios $q = N/D$ and data-vector sizes $D$. We then perform Bayesian inference with an EFT-based model and quantify each estimator through the Figure of Bias (FoB) and Figure of Merit (FoM). After correction for finite-$N$ effects, the sample covariance recovers unbiased average uncertainty volumes but suffers from growing best-fit scatter and bias at small $q$ due to the Dodelson--Schneider effect. Both NERCOME and RIE substantially reduce these stochastic shifts; however, the uncertainties they assign are probe-dependent. In configuration space, both estimators can yield overly tight constraints, with a bias that grows with $D$. In Fourier space, RIE delivers markedly improved best-fit stability with only mild FoM bias, whereas NERCOME tends to overestimate the constraining power. Among the estimators tested, RIE emerges as the most effective at stabilizing best-fit recovery, particularly in Fourier space, where it closely reproduces the reference posteriors even when the number of mocks barely exceeds the data-vector dimension.

AI.tldr: 该研究首次将旋转不变估计量（RIE）应用于大尺度星系聚类，发现在傅里叶空间中RIE能显著提升最佳拟合稳定性且约束偏差较小，优于样本协方差和非线性收缩估计量NERCOME。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景是宇宙学参数推断中星系成团性（galaxy clustering）的协方差矩阵与精度矩阵的准确估计问题。
AI.data: 研究中使用了受控合成数据集（controlled synthetic data sets），其协方差矩阵（covariance matrices）为解析已知（analytically known）。
AI.method: 研究采用的核心分析方法包括样本协方差（sample covariance）、非线性收缩估计器NERCOME和旋转不变估计器（Rotational Invariant Estimator, RIE），并基于EFT模型进行贝叶斯推断，通过偏差图（Figure of Bias, FoB）和优值图（Figure of Merit, FoM）量化评估。
AI.result: 对于星系大尺度聚类的协方差矩阵估计，旋转不变估计量（RIE）在傅里叶空间能显著提升最佳拟合值的稳定性，且仅引入轻微的优值图（FoM）偏差。

title: Sparks: The Magellan/FIRE survey from starburst to post-starburst
comment: Accepted for publication in ApJ
summary: Rapid transitions from starburst to quiescence constitute a key evolutionary pathway in galaxy formation. Post-starburst galaxies trace this brief phase, exhibiting optical spectra dominated by intermediate-age stellar populations with strong Balmer absorption features. Although rare locally, such systems are commonly revealed by JWST observations among massive galaxies at $z \gtrsim 3$. In the nearby Universe, their evolutionary stage remains uncertain: Balmer-strong galaxies hosting active galactic nuclei (AGN) show conflicting star formation rates (SFRs), with optical diagnostics implying quenching while far-infrared emission suggests ongoing obscured star formation. We present Sparks, an infrared survey designed to study the transition from starburst to post-starburst. Using the FIRE spectrograph on the Magellan Telescope, Sparks provides near-infrared spectra (0.82-2.51 $μ$m) for 93 local massive galaxies spanning three orders of magnitude in SFR, from starbursts to quenched post-starbursts, including AGN hosts. Here, we describe the survey goals, sample selection, observations, and data reduction, and examine galaxy properties derived from stellar population synthesis fitting of photometric data covering far-ultraviolet to far-infrared. Our new panchromatic-based SFR and star formation history measurements divide the sample into three groups: galaxies undergoing their first major starburst in the past $\sim 1$ Gyr; galaxies undergoing their second major starburst, with optical continua dominated by intermediate-age stellar populations formed during the previous recent burst; and post-burst quenching systems. AGN appear predominantly in the second group, explaining why systems with strong Balmer absorption and AGN show elevated far-infrared emission, and implying a short delay between starburst and black hole accretion.

AI.tldr: 这项研究通过Sparks红外巡天对93个本地大质量星系进行全波段分析，发现具有强巴尔默吸收线和活动星系核（AGN）的星系主要处于第二次主要星暴阶段，这解释了其远红外辐射增强现象，并暗示了星暴与黑洞吸积之间存在短暂延迟。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景或科学主题是星系形成中从星暴（starburst）到静止状态的快速转变过程，特别是对后星暴星系（post-starburst galaxies）的观测研究。
AI.data: 本研究使用的数据来源于Sparks巡天项目，该项目利用麦哲伦望远镜上的FIRE光谱仪，获取了93个本地大质量星系（涵盖从星暴到静止后星暴星系，包括活动星系核宿主）的0.82-2.51微米近红外光谱，并综合了从远紫外到远红外波段的测光数据。
AI.method: 采用覆盖远紫外至远红外的测光数据进行恒星种群合成拟合（stellar population synthesis fitting），以测量星暴历史（star formation history）和星暴后淬灭状态。
AI.result: 基于全波段测光数据的新星形成率（SFR）和恒星形成历史测量将样本分为三组：正在进行首次主要星暴的星系、正在进行第二次主要星暴的星系以及爆发后正在熄灭的星系。

title: The Material Point Method (MPM) for simulating hypervelocity impact on asteroids
comment: Accepted for publication in Icarus
summary: Shock-physics numerical codes are essential tools for describing the short but extreme fragmentation stage of the hypervelocity impact process on asteroids. However, accurately representing complex interior structures, surfaces, and contact mechanics in these events remains a significant challenge for traditional hydrocodes. This study introduces and validates an innovative yet underutilized technique, i.e., the Material Point Method (MPM), to simulate hyper-velocity impacts on asteroids. This approach offers new perspectives and solutions for capturing complex interfaces and handling the contact and boundary conditions in asteroid impact simulations. Our MPM implementation incorporates critical improvements to material models, including a pressure-dependent C^1 continuous yield criterion with quantifiable plastic strain, and a resolution-independent Grady-Kipp fragmentation model, to capture the complex physics of geological materials under extreme conditions. The framework is rigorously validated against laboratory impact experiments and benchmarked with smoothed particle hydrodynamics (SPH) simulations, confirming its robustness and precision. Crucially, when applied to asteroid-scale collisions, our model successfully reproduces the formation of large, coherent fragments analogous to (433) Eros. This work establishes MPM as a validated and powerful extension to the planetary scientist's toolkit, enabling the expansion of the parameter space and the treatment of complex contact and boundary conditions, which will enable more realistic simulations of asteroid evolution, family formation, and planetary defense scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过引入并验证物质点法（Material Point Method, MPM）来模拟小行星上的超高速撞击，其改进的材料模型成功再现了类似(433)Eros的大型连贯碎片的形成，为处理复杂界面和边界条件提供了新方案。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景或科学主题是模拟小行星（asteroid）遭受超高速撞击（hyper-velocity impact）的物理过程，以更真实地研究小行星演化、家族形成及行星防御等天体物理学问题。
AI.data: 本研究通过结合实验室冲击实验数据和与光滑粒子流体动力学（SPH）模拟的基准对比，对提出的物质点法（MPM）框架进行了严格验证。
AI.method: 本研究采用并验证了物质点法（Material Point Method, MPM）作为核心数值模拟技术，其实现包含了对材料模型的关键改进，如引入了压力相关的C^1连续屈服准则与可量化塑性应变，以及分辨率无关的Grady-Kipp碎裂模型，以捕捉极端条件下地质材料的复杂物理。
AI.result: 本研究验证了物质点法（MPM）能够精确模拟小行星高速撞击过程，成功再现了类似(433) Eros的大型连贯碎片的形成。

title: Dark energy, spatial curvature, and star formation efficiency from JWST photometric and spectroscopic high-redshift galaxies
comment: 18 pages, 8 sub-figures arranged into 6 figures, key figure with clear visual summary of results is Fig. 6
summary: Early observations from the James Webb Space Telescope (JWST) have revealed an overabundance of massive high-redshift galaxies, raising the question of whether this points to new physics beyond $Λ$CDM, or an enhanced formation efficiency of massive stars. We revisit this issue going beyond earlier analyses based on direct comparisons to theoretical bounds at a fixed cosmology, by performing a full Bayesian analysis of the most extreme galaxies in the CEERS imaging and FRESCO spectroscopic samples, jointly constraining cosmological parameters and the baryon-to-star conversion efficiency $ε$. We do so not only within the spatially flat $Λ$CDM model, but also in models where the dark energy equation of state $w$ and/or the spatial curvature parameter $Ω_K$ are allowed to vary, carefully discussing the impact of both $w$ and $Ω_K$ on the cumulative comoving stellar mass density. Within the flat $Λ$CDM model, once cosmological parameters are marginalized over, the CEERS sample provides a weak $2σ$ lower limit of $ε\gtrsim 0.07$, compatible with astrophysical expectations. In contrast, the FRESCO sample requires $ε\gtrsim 0.5$ at $2σ$, with values $ε\lesssim 0.2$ disfavored at $>5σ$. These results do not qualitatively change when we allow $w$ and/or $Ω_K$ to vary, with no evidence for deviations from $w=-1$ or $Ω_K=0$. Our results therefore suggest that the origin of the ``JWST tension'' is unlikely to be cosmological, but lies in the astrophysics of galaxy formation.

AI.tldr: 基于对CEERS和FRESCO样本中极端星系（high-redshift galaxies）的贝叶斯分析，该研究在允许暗能量状态方程（dark energy equation of state）和空间曲率（spatial curvature）变化的不同宇宙学模型中，发现对重子物质转恒星效率（baryon-to-star conversion efficiency）的约束结果与平坦ΛCDM模型一致，且无偏离标准宇宙学参数的证据，从而表明JWST观测到的大量高红移大质量星系所引发的“张力”更可能源于星系形成（galaxy formation）的天体物理过程而非新宇宙学。
AI.background: 该研究旨在探究詹姆斯·韦伯空间望远镜（JWST）早期观测到的高红移大质量星系（massive high-redshift galaxies）数量超出预期的现象是否源于ΛCDM模型之外的新物理（new physics）或大质量恒星形成效率的提升。
AI.data: 研究使用了来自詹姆斯·韦伯空间望远镜（JWST）的CEERS成像样本和FRESCO光谱样本的观测数据。
AI.method: 该研究采用贝叶斯分析（Bayesian analysis）方法，在允许暗能量状态方程（dark energy equation of state）$w$ 和空间曲率参数（spatial curvature parameter）$Ω_K$ 变化的不同模型中，联合约束宇宙学参数和重子转恒星效率（baryon-to-star conversion efficiency）$ε$。
AI.result: 在允许暗能量状态方程（w）和/或空间曲率参数（Ω_K）变化的情况下，分析未发现偏离w=-1或Ω_K=0的证据，表明“JWST张力”的根源很可能在于星系形成的天体物理学而非宇宙学。

title: Sparks II: Panchromatic SED modeling and galaxy physical properties across the starburst to post-starburst sequence
comment: Accepted for publication in ApJ
summary: The Sparks survey provides rest-frame near-infrared spectroscopy for 93 local massive galaxies spanning the rapid transition from starburst to post-starburst, including Balmer-strong galaxies as well as systems with active galactic nuclei (AGN). Interpreting these extreme systems requires reliable physical properties, yet these can vary substantially when derived from rest-frame optical spectroscopy versus multi-wavelength photometry, and across different fitting codes and assumptions. We assemble far-ultraviolet to far-infrared photometry for the Sparks sample and compare the resulting galaxy properties across data types and modeling approaches, identifying the final measurements adopted for the survey. With stellar masses recovered relatively robustly, we focus on the more model-dependent quantities of star formation rates (SFRs) and histories (SFHs), and AGN activity. Fits to optical stellar continuum alone, dominated by strong Balmer absorption, systematically favor rapidly declining SFHs and suppress ongoing star formation. Benchmarking against H$α$-based SFRs in the star-forming Sparks galaxies shows that Prospector fits to the optical continuum spectroscopy underestimate the SFR by 0.76 dex (scatter 0.42 dex), whereas panchromatic SED-based SFRs perform better, with a -0.15 dex offset and 0.14 dex scatter. We therefore adopt the panchromatic SED-based SFRs for composite and AGN hosts, finding that many exhibit higher levels of star formation than previously inferred. Finally, we test the AGN torus model in Prospector, finding that it successfully distinguishes optically-classified AGN from star-forming galaxies, but yields torus luminosities an order of magnitude below expectations from AGN bolometric luminosities, possibly indicating intrinsically low covering factors in Sparks AGN shaped by black-hole feedback during coalescence.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过对比光学连续谱与全波段SED拟合，发现对93个处于星暴至后星暴过渡阶段的本地大质量星系（包括巴耳末强星系和AGN），全波段SED能更可靠地获取其恒星形成率（SFR）和活动星系核（AGN）活动信息，并揭示许多此类星系的实际恒星形成水平高于先前基于光学谱的推断。
AI.background: 该研究聚焦于通过多波段光谱能量分布（SED）拟合，评估并优化对处于星暴（starburst）至后星暴（post-starburst）快速过渡阶段的本地大质量星系中恒星形成率（SFRs）、恒星形成历史（SFHs）及活动星系核（AGN）活动等模型依赖性物理参数的可靠提取方法。
AI.data: 该研究使用的数据包括Sparks样本的远紫外至远红外多波段测光数据（panchromatic SED）以及光学连续谱光谱数据。
AI.method: 采用的核心分析方法包括利用从远紫外到远红外的全波段光谱能量分布（SED）进行拟合，并基于Prospector代码测试了AGN环面模型（torus model）。
AI.result: 基于全波段SED拟合的恒星形成率（SFR）比仅基于光学连续谱拟合的结果更可靠，且揭示了许多复合星系与活动星系核（AGN）寄主星系的恒星形成水平高于先前推断。

title: Solar photospheric spectrum microvariability III. Radial velocities and line profiles in magnetic active-region granulation
comment: 13 pages, 10 figures, accepted for publication in Astronomy & Astrophysics
summary: Finding low-mass planets around solar-type stars requires to understand the physical variability of the host star, which greatly exceeds the planet-induced radial-velocity modulation. Different solar photospheric absorption lines have slightly disparate responses to stellar activity, which should permit to disentangle wavelength shifts induced by exoplanets from those originating in stellar atmospheres. Changing area coverage of magnetic active-region granulation (faculae and plage) causes radial-velocity fluctuations of the disk-integrated solar spectrum, whose precise modeling requires active-region spectral line profiles. Hydrodynamic 3D modeling of granulation in magnetic fields extends previous non-magnetic studies, revealing different line profiles and altered convective velocity shifts. Different types of lines in the visual and near infrared are examined in synthetic hyper-high resolution spectra (R~900,000), comparing non-magnetic areas with those with strongly magnetic (240 mT = 2400 G) granulation. Magnetic fields inhibit convective motions, decrease the energy flow, produce more symmetric lines, and remove the common blueshift with its familiar C-shape bisectors. Unexpectedly, magnetic granulation displays convective redshifts. Their origin is traced to contributions from small areas, where hot and bright down-moving elements are created through shocks and adiabatic compression when rising gas is forced over into magnetically channeled downflows. Understanding line formation in also stellar active regions is needed to simulate full-disk spectra toward exoEarth detections. Detailed shapes of spectral lines carry significant information, suggesting that hyper-high spectral resolution may ultimately be required

AI.tldr: 该研究通过磁流体动力学三维建模揭示了强磁场（240 mT）下太阳光球层磁化米粒组织（magnetic granulation）的光谱线特征，发现其抑制对流运动、产生更对称的谱线并意外地呈现对流红移（convective redshift），这为区分系外行星引起的径向速度信号与恒星活动噪声提供了关键依据。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景是理解恒星活动（如磁活动区）对光谱线轮廓和视向速度的影响，以区分系外行星信号与恒星大气噪声。
AI.data: 研究使用了合成超高分辨率光谱（R~900,000），该光谱通过对非磁化区域和强磁化（240 mT = 2400 G）的米粒组织进行流体动力学三维建模生成。
AI.method: 研究采用三维磁流体动力学模型模拟太阳磁化区和非磁化区的对流运动，并基于此合成超高分辨率（R~900,000）光谱，通过对比分析不同谱线（包括可见光和近红外波段）的轮廓、对流速度偏移及双极子形态，以提取磁化对流对谱线形成的影响。
AI.result: 强磁场抑制了对流运动、减少了能量流动、使谱线更对称并消除了常见的蓝移及其典型的C形双极轮廓。

title: BROOM: a python package for model-independent analysis of microwave astronomical data
comment: 70 pages, 20 figures. Comments welcome
summary: We present BROOM, a new python package for the application of blind, minimum-variance component-separation techniques to microwave observations. The package enables the reconstruction of signals with known spectral energy distributions, such as the Cosmic Microwave Background (CMB), Sunyaev--Zeldovich distortions, or foreground moments, in both temperature and polarization through a suite of Internal Linear Combination (ILC) implementations, in the presence of astrophysical and instrumental contaminants. In addition, BROOM supports the blind reconstruction of coherent emission components with unknown covariance properties via a Generalized ILC (GILC) framework. Beyond component separation, the package provides tools to diagnose foreground complexity and to estimate residual contamination leaking into reconstructed maps across angular scales and sky regions. It also includes utilities to generate realistic microwave simulations for arbitrary CMB experiments and to compute angular power spectra of the resulting products. We present a comprehensive description and validation of the implemented pipelines in two representative experimental configurations: a full-sky satellite mission and a ground-based experiment. BROOM is publicly available, fully documented, and easily installable at https://github.com/alecarones/broom

AI.tldr: 该研究开发了名为BROOM的Python软件包，通过内部线性组合（ILC）和广义ILC（GILC）方法，实现了对宇宙微波背景（CMB）等已知光谱信号及未知协方差相干成分的盲分离，并提供了诊断前景复杂性和估计残余污染的工具。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景是开发用于微波观测中盲最小方差成分分离（component separation）的Python软件包，以支持宇宙微波背景（CMB）等已知谱能量分布信号的提取。
AI.data: 该研究使用模拟数据（simulation）进行验证，具体通过软件包内嵌工具生成适用于任意宇宙微波背景（CMB）实验的逼真微波模拟数据。
AI.method: 该研究采用了一套内部线性组合（Internal Linear Combination, ILC）实现方法，包括用于重建具有未知协方差特性的相干发射成分的广义ILC（Generalized ILC, GILC）框架。
AI.result: BROOM是一个用于微波观测中盲最小方差成分分离（component separation）的新Python软件包，能通过内部线性组合（Internal Linear Combination, ILC）方法重建已知光谱能量分布的信号（如宇宙微波背景（Cosmic Microwave Background, CMB）），并支持通过广义内部线性组合（Generalized ILC, GILC）框架盲重建协方差属性未知的相干发射成分。

title: A spatial and kinematical reinterpretation of Gould's Belt in light of Gaia
comment: Submitted to A&A. Comments are welcome
summary: We reassess the long-standing idea of Gould's Belt using Gaia DR3 for a sample of young massive stars and nearby young clusters. The structure surrounding the Sun, often interpreted as an inclined, expanding, and rotating ring, emerges in our analysis as a transient alignment of a few cluster families rather than an individual, coherent dynamical feature. By combining the ALS III catalog of OB stars with a homogeneous sample of clusters younger than 70 Myr, and by tracing their motions in a realistic Galactic potential, we show that neither the spatial distribution nor the kinematics form a unified system. The inferred expansion, rotation, and bulk motion of the Belt can be reproduced by the superposition of the $α$Per, Cr135, M6, and $γ$Vel cluster families and are further amplified by solar reflex motion and historical assumptions about the local standard of rest (LSR). The classic inclined geometry is largely explained by the oscillatory pattern of the Radcliffe Wave, which contributes a major arc of the supposed ring. Taken together, these results indicate that Gould's Belt is not a physical structure but a 3D asterism shaped by a complex local star formation history, observational biases, and projection effects.

AI.tldr: 基于盖亚（Gaia）DR3数据对年轻大质量恒星和邻近年轻星团的分析表明，古尔德带（Gould's Belt）并非一个独立的、连贯的动力学结构，而是由数个星团家族（如$α$Per、Cr135、M6和$γ$Vel）的短暂空间排列、拉德克利夫波（Radcliffe Wave）的振荡模式、太阳相对运动以及局部静止标准（LSR）的历史假设共同投影形成的三维星群（3D asterism）。
AI.background: 该研究聚焦于重新评估古尔德带（Gould's Belt）这一长期存在的天文学概念，探讨其作为太阳系附近恒星与年轻星团分布结构的物理本质。
AI.data: 研究结合了盖亚卫星第三次数据发布（Gaia DR3）的观测数据、ALS III星表中OB型恒星样本以及年龄小于70 Myr的邻近年轻星团同质样本。
AI.method: 研究结合ALS III星表与年龄小于70 Myr的年轻星团样本，在现实的银河系势场中追踪其运动轨迹，以分析其空间分布与运动学特征。
AI.result: 古尔德带（Gould's Belt）并非一个独立的物理结构，而是由多个年轻星团家族（如αPer、Cr135、M6和γVel）的叠加、太阳反射运动、观测偏差以及投影效应共同形成的一个三维星群（3D asterism）。

title: A Unified HI Rotation Curve Corpus for Computational Astrophysics: 438 Galaxies from SPARC, THINGS, LITTLE THINGS, and WALLABY DR2
comment: 18 pages, 3 figures, 3 tables. Data available at https://zenodo.org/records/19563417. Submitted to Astronomy and Computing
summary: We present a unified corpus of 8,963 spatially resolved HI rotation curve measurements across 423 galaxies (438 total catalog entries including 15 metadata-only THINGS galaxies), drawn from four major surveys: SPARC (175), THINGS (34), LITTLE THINGS (26), and WALLABY DR2 (203). The corpus is distributed as a single structured JSON file with nested per-ring kinematic data, survey metadata, column definitions, and data-quality annotations, accompanied by a 438-row flat CSV for catalog-level filtering. All radii are in kiloparsecs, all velocities in km/s. Kinematic parameters have been verified against scanned primary tables. A two-tier quality system distinguishes hand-curated rotation curves with per-point uncertainties (Tier 1) from automated pipeline products (Tier 2). The corpus was designed for both traditional numerical analysis and Large Language Model retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipelines. Three worked examples demonstrate single-galaxy rotation curve plotting, multi-component baryonic analysis, and corpus-level parameter-space exploration, each requiring fewer than 15 lines of Python. The corpus is publicly available at Zenodo (DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19563417) under CC BY 4.0.

AI.tldr: 该研究整合了来自SPARC、THINGS、LITTLE THINGS和WALLABY DR2四大巡天的423个星系（共438个条目）的8,963个空间分辨中性氢（HI）旋转曲线（rotation curve）测量数据，构建了一个统一、结构化且公开可用的数据集，旨在支持传统数值分析和大型语言模型检索增强生成（RAG）流程。
AI.background: 该研究聚焦于构建一个用于星系旋转曲线（rotation curve）分析的综合数据资源。
AI.data: 数据来源于四个主要巡天项目：SPARC（175个星系）、THINGS（34个星系）、LITTLE THINGS（26个星系）和WALLABY DR2（203个星系）。
AI.method: 研究采用了两级质量系统区分带逐点不确定度的手动整理旋转曲线（Tier 1）与自动化流程产品（Tier 2），并以结构化JSON文件与扁平CSV文件分发数据，支持传统数值分析与大型语言模型检索增强生成（RAG）流程。
AI.result: 该研究构建并发布了一个包含8,963个空间分辨HI旋转曲线（HI rotation curve）测量值的统一星表，涵盖来自四个主要巡天的423个星系（共438个条目）。

title: TDCOSMO XXV: A "soup-to-nuts" 6.5% $H_0$ measurement $-$ strong lensing and dynamics with a maximally flexible mass sheet
comment: 24 pages, 14 figures, 8 tables, submitted to Physical Review D
summary: We present a blind time-delay cosmography measurement of the Hubble constant $H_0$ based on the quadruply imaged quasar SDSSJ1433+6007. Our analysis combines deep Hubble Space Telescope imaging, extended time-delay monitoring from the Wendelstein and Maidanak Observatories, and spatially resolved stellar kinematics from the Keck Cosmic Web Imager and Reionization Mapper. We build a robust lens model to reconstruct the mass distribution and high-signal-to-noise kinematic maps to break the mass-sheet degeneracy (MSD), explicitly accounting for the lens galaxy's oblateness, rotation, and anisotropy. Furthermore, we constrain the external convergence ($κ_{\rm ext}$) by characterizing the line-of-sight environment using wide-field photometry from the Dark Energy Spectroscopic Instrument (DESI) Legacy Survey data release 10. We incorporate these constraints into our joint lensing and dynamical model, running multiple iterations to estimate random and systematic uncertainties. Accounting for maximal flexibility of the mass-sheet transformation, and assuming a flat $Λ$CDM cosmology and an $Ω_{\rm m, 0}$ prior from DESI data release 2, we infer $H_0 = 73.2^{+4.8}_{-4.7}$ km s$^{-1}$ Mpc$^{-1}$ (a $6.5\%$ precision), and an internal mass-sheet parameter $λ_{\rm int}=1.12^{+0.05}_{-0.06}$. Notably, $λ_{\rm int}$ is $2σ$ away from unity for this system, highlighting the importance of treating it as a free parameter. Our $H_0$ measurement is consistent with the result from our 2025 milestone paper, and it will be included in our next hierarchical analysis to improve the overall precision. Moving forward, the comprehensive pipeline demonstrated herein establishes a robust framework that can be readily applied to future strongly lensed systems to further refine cosmological constraints.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过对四重像类星体SDSSJ1433+6007进行盲时间延迟宇宙学测量，结合强透镜建模、运动学观测及视线环境约束，在平坦ΛCDM宇宙学模型下推断出哈勃常数（H_0）为73.2^{+4.8}_{-4.7} km s^{-1} Mpc^{-1}，并发现内部质量薄片参数（λ_int）显著偏离1，强调了将其作为自由参数处理的重要性。
AI.background: 该研究旨在通过强引力透镜（strong gravitational lensing）时间延迟法精确测量哈勃常数（Hubble constant, H0），以约束宇宙学参数。
AI.data: 研究使用了哈勃空间望远镜（Hubble Space Telescope）的深度成像、温德尔施泰因（Wendelstein）和迈丹纳克（Maidanak）天文台的长期时延监测数据、凯克宇宙网成像仪与再电离测绘仪（Keck Cosmic Web Imager and Reionization Mapper）的空间分辨恒星运动学数据，以及暗能量光谱仪（Dark Energy Spectroscopic Instrument, DESI）遗产巡天数据发布10的宽视场测光数据。
AI.method: 研究采用的核心分析方法包括构建稳健的引力透镜模型以重建质量分布，并结合高信噪比运动学地图以打破质量片简并（MSD），同时利用暗能量光谱仪（DESI）Legacy Survey数据对视线方向环境进行表征以约束外部收敛（κ_ext），并将这些约束纳入联合透镜与动力学模型中进行多次迭代以估计随机和系统不确定性。
AI.result: 基于对SDSSJ1433+6007的联合透镜和动力学建模，并假设平坦ΛCDM宇宙学模型，本研究推断出哈勃常数（H_0）为73.2^{+4.8}_{-4.7} km s^{-1} Mpc^{-1}，内部质量片（mass-sheet）参数λ_{int}=1.12^{+0.05}_{-0.06}。

title: The Great Escape of ionizing photons during Cosmic Morning
comment: 26 pages, 15 figures, 3 tables, submitted to ApJ
summary: The end of the Cosmic Dark Age marked the onset of reionization, driven by extreme-UV photons from the first galaxies. Direct detection of such photons has remained challenging due to strong intergalactic attenuation. Here, we report the first direct detection of ionizing photons at rest-frame wavelengths $350Å$, $392Å$, and $485Å$, using deep UV imaging from two independent space observatories: AstroSat and HST. These photons emerge from a stacked sample of spectroscopically confirmed Ly$α$ emitters at $5.9<z<6.0$ in the Hubble Ultra Deep Field identified with VLT/MUSE and JWST/NIRSpec. These detections imply a higher transparency of the interstellar and intergalactic media to ionizing radiation than predicted by current models. The stacked spectrum, representative of faint galaxies with $M_{\mathrm{UV}}=-18.77\pm0.05$ ($\sim0.1L^{\ast}$), exhibits a hard slope ($-2.3\pm0.1$) and produces ionizing photons with $\text{log}_{10}ξ_{\text{ion}}^{true}$ = $25.86 \pm 0.02$ Hz erg$^{-1}$ and escape fraction $f_{esc}\simeq 0.8$. Individual measurements reveal very blue UV continua ($β\leq -3$) for three galaxies), young ages ($< 6$ Myr for four), and low metallicities ($Z \sim 0.02 - 0.05\ Z_{\odot}$ for two), indicating the possible presence of very hot, massive stars capable of producing enough ionizing photons to drive cosmic reionization, thereby providing new constraints on its sources. Furthermore, detection of photons with energies $>24.6\ $eV provide evidence that HeI reionization has begun by this epoch.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过AstroSat和HST的深紫外成像，首次直接探测到红移5.9-6.0莱曼阿尔法发射体（Lyα emitters）在静止波长350Å、392Å和485Å的电离光子，发现其星际和星系际介质对电离辐射的透明度高于现有模型预测，且其硬紫外谱斜率、高电离光子产生效率（log₁₀ξ_ion^true = 25.86 ± 0.02 Hz erg⁻¹）及高逃逸分数（f_esc ≃ 0.8）表明这些拥有年轻年龄、低金属丰度及极蓝紫外连续谱的微弱星系可能含有能产生足量电离光子的炽热大质量恒星，为宇宙再电离（reionization）来源提供了新约束，同时>24.6 eV光子的探测表明该时期氦I（HeI）再电离已开始。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景或科学主题是宇宙再电离（reionization）时期，特别是由首批星系产生的极端紫外光子所驱动的宇宙黑暗时代结束过程。
AI.data: 研究使用了来自两个独立空间天文台（AstroSat和HST）的深紫外成像数据，以及基于VLT/MUSE和JWST/NIRSpec在哈勃超深场（Hubble Ultra Deep Field）中光谱确认的Lyα发射体（Lyα emitters）的叠加样本。
AI.method: 采用深紫外成像（AstroSat和HST）对光谱证认的莱曼阿尔法发射体（Lyα emitters）进行叠加分析，并利用叠加光谱测量紫外连续谱斜率、电离光子产生效率（ξ_ion）和逃逸分数（f_esc）等物理参数。
AI.result: 通过叠加HUDF中红移5.9-6.0的莱曼阿尔法发射体（Lyα emitters），首次直接探测到了350Å、392Å和485Å的静止波长电离光子，表明星际和星系际介质对电离辐射的透明度高于当前模型预测。

title: SJET: An Interactive Solar Jet Extraction Tool
comment: Accepted for publication in RAS Techniques and Instruments. Source code available at https://github.com/songsolarphysics/SJET
summary: Solar jets are dynamic collimated plasma flows in the solar atmosphere that play crucial roles in coronal heating and solar wind acceleration. Their complex and diverse morphologies pose significant challenges for developing universal algorithms for automatic identification and extraction, particularly for on-disk jets affected by projection effects and background contamination. We present SJET, an interactive tool for solar jet feature extraction using multiple algorithms developed in Python that integrates five thresholding algorithms with morphological operations. SJET implements a novel method for identifying start and end points based on circular regions that objectively determines jet propagation direction by exploiting morphological asymmetry, combined with modeling the axis using quadratic Bézier curves for accurate extraction of geometric parameters including length, width, curvature, and deflection angles. Validation analyses using Solar Orbiter/EUI high-resolution image and SDO/AIA observations demonstrate SJET's effectiveness across different observational conditions, with good agreement compared to traditional analysis methods, though the tool's accuracy remains dependent on user-defined threshold parameters and region of interest selection. SJET provides a solution to method inconsistency in solar jet research through standardized processing workflows, establishing a technical foundation for large-sample statistical studies.

AI.tldr: 该研究开发了用于太阳喷流（solar jet）特征提取的交互式工具SJET，它通过整合多种阈值算法与形态学操作、利用形态不对称性客观确定传播方向并结合二次贝塞尔曲线建模轴线，实现了对喷流几何参数的准确提取，为大规模样本统计研究建立了技术基础。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景或科学主题是太阳大气中动态准直等离子体流（solar jets）的自动识别与特征提取方法研究。
AI.data: 该研究使用了太阳轨道器（Solar Orbiter）的极紫外成像仪（EUI）高分辨率图像和太阳动力学天文台（SDO）的大气成像组件（AIA）的观测数据。
AI.method: 该研究采用了一种集成五种阈值算法与形态学操作的方法，并结合了基于圆形区域识别起止点以利用形态不对称性客观确定喷流传播方向的新方法，以及使用二次贝塞尔曲线（quadratic Bézier curves）建模喷流轴线以精确提取几何参数。
AI.result: SJET工具通过集成多种阈值算法与形态学操作，并结合基于圆形区域的起止点识别与二次贝塞尔曲线轴建模方法，实现了对太阳喷流（solar jet）几何参数（如长度、宽度、曲率、偏转角）的准确提取。

title: CII fine-structure line observations of the Sagittarius C Region in the Galaxy's Central Molecular Zone
comment: Accepted for publication in A&A
summary: Context. Sagittarius C (Sgr C) is a massive, relatively quiescent complex at the western edge of the Galaxy's Central Molecular Zone (CMZ). While the Sgr B2 region has been extensively studied, Sgr C has received comparatively less attention. Aims. We aim to characterize the kinematics and physical state of the gas in Sgr C using spatially and velocity-resolved [CII] 158 microns emission. This line traces the multi-phase interstellar medium, providing a crucial complement to molecular, infrared, and radio observations. Methods. We present a fully sampled 74x47 pc map of the [CII] line toward Sgr C, observed with SOFIA. The data feature a 0.55 pc spatial and 1 km/s spectral resolution. These observations are analyzed in conjunction with ancillary maps of the CO(2-1) transition and its isotopologues from the APEX telescope. Results. [CII] emission is widespread, showing a continuous structure extending from Sgr A to Sgr C with complex morphology. The bulk emission arises at negative radial velocities, consistent with Galactic rotation. The most prominent feature is the giant Sgr C HII region, where [CII] reveals an expanding, ring-like shell interpreted as a photo-dissociation region (PDR). Kinematic modelling yields an expansion velocity of 23 km/s and a dynamical age of about 0.13 Myr. Our analysis suggests that stellar winds from known massive stars are insufficient to power the observed expansion, pointing toward alternative drivers like a buried supernova. Finally, we find a striking spatial association between this shell and a non-thermal radio filament, indicating that the shell's expansion has triggered high-mass star formation at its edge.

AI.tldr: 该研究利用高分辨率[CII]谱线观测人马座C（Sgr C），发现其核心的巨型HII区存在一个由膨胀壳层（光致离解区）驱动的、年龄约0.13 Myr的环状结构，其膨胀速度达23 km/s且可能由隐藏的超新星驱动，并与非热射电细丝空间关联，表明壳层膨胀触发了其边缘的大质量恒星形成。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景是银河系中央分子区（CMZ）西部边缘一个相对宁静但质量巨大的复合体人马座C（Sgr C）的星际介质物理与运动学特性。
AI.data: 研究使用了SOFIA观测的[CII] 158微米发射线数据（空间分辨率0.55 pc，速度分辨率1 km/s）以及APEX望远镜的CO(2-1)及其同位素谱线的辅助数据。
AI.method: 该研究采用的核心分析方法是对人马座C（Sgr C）区域进行空间与速度分辨的[CII] 158微米谱线观测（使用SOFIA平台），并结合APEX望远镜的CO(2-1)及其同位素谱线辅助数据，通过运动学建模（kinematic modelling）分析气体运动与物理状态。
AI.result: 结果（result）部分：在Sgr C的巨型HII区中，[CII]发射揭示了一个膨胀的环状壳层，其膨胀速度约为23 km/s，动力学年龄约0.13 Myr，且该壳层与一条非热射电细丝在空间上显著关联，表明其膨胀触发了边缘的高质量恒星形成。

title: Probing Coronal Activity Using Radio Signals Based on the 2021 superior conjunction of Mars: the Downlink Data from Tianwen-1
summary: During the first superior conjunction of the Tianwen-1 Mars probe in October 2021, its downlink signal received by the Wuqing 70-m radio telescope passed within 4.53 solar radii of the Sun. The signal was significantly perturbed by the solar wind, providing a mechanism to probe coronal activity. We analyze the Doppler frequency scintillation spectrum of the solar wind within 10 solar radii to derive a characteristic frequency scintillation parameter. Statistical analysis indicates this parameter increases as the signal path approaches the Sun, with notable anomalies observed on October 5, 13, and 15. Comparisons with SOHO and SDO data reveal strong spatio-temporal correlations between these scintillation anomalies and coronal activity. We demonstrate that this parameter effectively identifies solar phenomena, including coronal streamers, high-speed solar wind, and coronal mass ejections (CMEs). Quantitative analysis confirms a distinct temporal correlation and delay between frequency scintillation and solar wind speed changes, validating the feasibility of spatially localizing solar activity.

AI.tldr: 基于天问一号（Tianwen-1）下行信号在10个太阳半径（solar radii）内受太阳风扰动的分析，该研究通过提取频率闪烁（frequency scintillation）参数，首次利用深空探测器信号有效识别了包括冕流、高速太阳风和日冕物质抛射（CMEs）在内的多种日冕活动，并验证了该参数与太阳风速度变化间存在明确的时间相关性和延迟，从而证实了空间定位太阳活动的可行性。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景是利用行星际探测器下行信号受太阳风扰动（频率闪烁）的现象，探测日冕活动（coronal activity）并验证其空间定位的可行性。
AI.data: 研究使用的数据来源是天问一号（Tianwen-1）火星探测器在2021年10月第一次上合期间，由武清70米射电望远镜接收的下行链路信号，以及用于对比的SOHO和SDO卫星数据。
AI.method: 研究采用的核心分析方法是对太阳风引起的多普勒频率闪烁（frequency scintillation）谱进行分析以提取特征参数，并结合SOHO和SDO数据进行时空相关性比较与定量分析。
AI.result: 基于天问一号（Tianwen-1）下行信号的多普勒频率闪烁（frequency scintillation）参数分析，研究发现该参数能有效识别日冕流、高速太阳风及日冕物质抛射（CMEs）等太阳活动，并与SOHO和SDO数据在时空上存在强相关性。

title: Searching for axions with quantum interferometry
comment: 19 pages, 4 figures, comments are welcome
summary: Quantum phase measurements offer a complementary route to axion searches. We show that axion-photon interactions can imprint both Aharonov-Bohm (AB) and Berry phases in experimentally motivated quantum setups. For a coherently oscillating axion dark matter background, the induced effective current generates a time dependent magnetic flux in an rf-SQUID, leading to a measurable voltage signal through the Josephson phase. For representative benchmarks, this AB phase search reaches the minimum axion-photon coupling $g_{aγγ}^{\mathrm{min}}\sim 7.8\times10^{-14}~\mathrm{GeV}^{-1}$ at axion mass $m_a\sim 10^{-10}~\mathrm{eV}$, with projected sensitivity that can improve on existing limits in that parameter space by roughly one to two orders of magnitude. We also identify a geometric phase observable in a Mach-Zehnder interferometer with an adiabatically rotating magnetic field, providing a proof-of-principle phase-based probe of meV-scale axions even when they do not constitute the dark matter, although sensitivity on the coupling remains weaker than current bounds with conservative tabletop benchmarks. Extending the analysis to a three level photon-axion quasiparticle (AQP)-axion system, with the AQP realized in a topological magnetic insulator, we find a potentially measurable THz Berry phase dominated by the AQP sector, furnishing a nontrivial validation of the formalism in a richer coupled system. These setups establish quantum phase observables as a useful new framework for axion searches, with immediate phenomenological promise in superconducting circuits and longer term potential in quantum enhanced interferometry.

title: The DECam MAGIC Survey: Investigating the Jet Stellar Stream with Photometric Metallicities
comment: 18 pages, 7 figures, 3 tables, Submitted to AAS Journals
summary: Stellar streams are dynamically fragile structures formed by the tidal disruption of dwarf galaxies and stellar clusters. These objects are valuable tracers of the gravitational potential and accretion history of the Milky Way, and are key probes for the presence and interactions of starless dark matter subhalos. The Jet stream is a $\sim 30^\circ$-long stellar stream that is situated at 30.4 kpc and originates from a disrupted globular cluster.It consists of metal-poor stars that follow a retrograde orbit, reducing the impulse imparted from the Milky Way bar and making it especially sensitive to gravitational perturbations from dark matter subhalos. This paper investigates the known extent of the Jet stream by leveraging photometric metallicities derived from a narrowband filter centered on the Ca II H&K lines at $\sim$3950A on the Dark Energy Camera (DECam), as part of the Mapping the Ancient Galaxy in CaHK (MAGIC) survey. The wide field-of-view of DECam enables the efficient derivation of photometric metallicities for stars across the full extent of the stream, allowing for a metallicity-based selection to identify likely members. We demonstrate the efficacy of photometric metallicities in isolating stream members when used with Gaia DR3 proper motions, identifying a sample of 213 candidate Jet stream member stars. This then allows for the study of stream morphology, through which we identify a clear fanning of the stream toward the end farther from the Milky Way bar. We provide a list of candidate members, enabling spectroscopic follow-up of the Jet stream to facilitate further studies of its dynamics.

AI.tldr: 该研究利用DECam窄带测光金属丰度结合Gaia DR3自行数据，在MAGIC巡天中识别出213颗Jet星流候选成员星，并发现该星流在远离银河系棒（bar）的末端呈现明显的扇形展宽（fanning）形态。
