AI.method: 研究采用基于暗能量相机（DECam）窄带滤光片（中心波长约3950A，针对Ca II H&K线）的光度学金属丰度测量技术，结合盖亚（Gaia）DR3自行数据，对候选成员星进行识别。
AI.result: 利用CaHK测光金属丰度与Gaia DR3自行数据识别出213颗候选成员星，并发现该星流在远离银河系棒（bar）的末端存在明显的扇形展宽（fanning）。

title: VIGILant: an automatic classification pipeline for glitches in the Virgo detector
summary: Glitches frequently contaminate data in gravitational-wave detectors, complicating the observation and analysis of astrophysical signals. This work introduces VIGILant, an automatic pipeline for classification and visualization of glitches in the Virgo detector. Using a curated dataset of Virgo O3b glitches, two machine learning approaches are evaluated: tree-based models (Decision Tree, Random Forest and XGBoost) using structured Omicron parameters, and Convolutional Neural Networks (ResNet) trained on spectrogram images. While tree-based models offer higher interpretability and fast training, the ResNet34 model achieved superior performance, reaching a F1 score of 0.9772 and accuracy of 0.9833 in the testing set, with inference times of tens of milliseconds per glitch. The pipeline has been deployed for daily operation at the Virgo site since observing run O4c, providing the Virgo collaboration with an interactive dashboard to monitor glitch populations and detector behavior. This allows to identify low-confidence predictions, highlighting glitches requiring further attention.

AI.tldr: 本文针对Virgo引力波探测器中的瞬态噪声（glitches），开发并部署了自动分类可视化管线VIGILant，发现基于ResNet34的卷积神经网络模型在测试集上取得了0.9833的准确率，性能优于基于结构化参数的树模型。
AI.background: 该研究聚焦于引力波探测器中常见的数据污染问题，即突发噪声（glitches）的自动分类与可视化，以提升天体物理信号观测与分析的有效性。
AI.data: 该研究使用来自Virgo探测器O3b运行阶段的精选故障（glitches）数据集。
AI.method: 研究采用机器学习方法，包括基于结构化Omicron参数的树模型（决策树、随机森林和XGBoost）以及基于频谱图训练的卷积神经网络（ResNet）。
AI.result: VIGILant管道利用ResNet34模型在测试集上实现了0.9772的F1分数和0.9833的准确率，对引力波探测器中的瞬态干扰（glitch）分类性能优越。

title: Axion Inflation from Heavy-Fermion One-Loop Effects
comment: 14 pages, 4 figures
summary: We derive a one-loop effective description of axion inflation by integrating out a heavy Dirac fermion with an inflaton-dependent complex mass undergoing a smooth localized threshold transition. The threshold induces correlated corrections to the inflaton and gauge sectors, including a Coleman-Weinberg term, a vacuum-polarization correction, and an anomaly-induced Chern-Simons coupling. Together, these effects transiently enhance and localize gauge-field production, generating a chiral stochastic gravitational-wave background in the deci-hertz band within the projected sensitivities of BBO and DECIGO, while remaining below representative primordial-black-hole bounds.

AI.tldr: 这篇论文通过积分掉经历平滑局域阈值转变的具有暴胀子依赖复质量的狄拉克费米子，推导了轴子暴胀的单圈有效描述，发现阈值转变诱导的暴胀子与规范场修正会瞬态增强局域规范场产生，从而在BBO和DECIGO探测灵敏度的分赫兹频段内产生一个手征随机引力波背景，同时保持在典型原初黑洞界限以下。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景或科学主题是探讨在轴子暴胀（axion inflation）框架下，通过整合重狄拉克费米子（heavy Dirac fermion）的阈值跃迁效应，研究暴胀子与规范场（gauge field）的耦合修正及其对原初引力波（primordial gravitational-wave）产生的瞬态增强。
AI.data: 该研究通过积分掉一个具有暴胀子依赖的复质量并经历平滑局部阈值跃迁的重狄拉克费米子，推导了轴子暴胀的单圈有效描述。
AI.method: 研究采用的核心分析方法是通过积分掉具有暴胀子依赖复质量且经历平滑局域阈值转变的重狄拉克费米子，推导出轴子暴胀的单圈有效描述。
AI.result: 该研究通过积分出经历平滑局域阈值转变的具有暴胀子依赖复质量的狄拉克费米子，推导了轴子暴胀（axion inflation）的单圈有效描述，其中阈值转变引发了对暴胀子和规范场（gauge sector）的关联修正，包括科尔曼-温伯格项（Coleman-Weinberg term）、真空极化修正和反常诱导的Chern-Simons耦合，这些效应共同瞬时增强并局域化了规范场产生，从而在BBO和DECIGO探测灵敏度范围内的分赫兹频段（deci-hertz band）产生了一个手征随机引力波背景（chiral stochastic gravitational-wave background），同时保持在典型原初黑洞（primordial-black-hole）界限以下。

title: ALESS--JWST: Dust-driven Morphologies and Hidden Stellar Mass in $z\sim3$ Sub-millimeter Galaxies
comment: Submitted to Astrophysical Journal
summary: We present JWST/NIRCam and MIRI observations of twelve $z\sim3$ sub-millimeter galaxies (SMGs) from the ALESS survey, combined with high-resolution ($0.08''-0.16''$) ALMA 870$μ$m imaging, enabling spatially resolved SED fitting on $\sim$kpc scales. We find a resolved star-forming main sequence linking surface densities of star formation rate and stellar mass, suggesting star formation remains tightly coupled to local mass distribution even in obscured systems. Our resolved SED analysis reveals a systematic stellar mass bias in integrated fits, even including rest-frame $\sim2μ$m MIRI imaging. Rather than classical `outshining', this is mainly driven by spatially varying dust attenuation, indicating a `dust-obscuration bias' that causes obscured stellar mass to be missed. We show SMG morphologies are wavelength-dependent. At rest-frame optical wavelengths, central obscuration produces stellar-dust offsets and inflated sizes, while at longer wavelengths these effects diminish. The rest-frame $\sim1.5-3μ$m MIRI imaging is less affected by dust than NIRCam and reveals compact stellar structures matching the 870$μ$m dust continuum. We find centrally concentrated dust attenuation drives both offsets and size variations, demonstrating dust geometry is the main driver of structural diversity. Consequently, morphologies from rest-frame wavelengths $\lesssim1.6μ$m can be biased without longer-wavelength constraints. The intrinsic stellar mass and dust continuum sizes are consistent ($R_\mathrm{e,870μm}/R_\mathrm{e,\ast}=1.0\pm0.4$), supporting a picture in which SMGs host compact, obscured star formation that builds dense stellar cores, consistent with evolution into massive quiescent galaxies. We suggest such obscured structures and associated biases may also be common among massive star-forming galaxies at $z\gtrsim1$, implying these effects are likely of broad relevance.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过高分辨率多波段观测发现，亚毫米星系（SMG）中空间变化的尘埃衰减导致集成光谱拟合产生系统性恒星质量低估（即“尘埃遮蔽偏差”），且尘埃几何分布是造成其形态波长依赖性和结构多样性的主要驱动力，支持了其致密遮蔽性恒星形成构建致密恒星核并演化为大质量宁静星系的图像。
AI.background: 该研究聚焦于利用高分辨率多波段观测揭示高红移亚毫米星系（SMG）中尘埃遮蔽对恒星质量测量和形态分析的偏差效应及其对星系结构演化的影响。
AI.data: 研究使用了JWST/NIRCam和MIRI对十二个$z\sim3$亚毫米波星系（SMG）的观测数据，并结合了高分辨率（$0.08''-0.16''$）的ALMA 870$μ$m成像数据。
AI.method: 研究采用了结合JWST/NIRCam与MIRI观测数据、高分辨率ALMA 870μm成像以及空间分辨（~kpc尺度）的SED拟合（Spectral Energy Distribution fitting，光谱能量分布拟合）方法。
AI.result: 通过高分辨率多波段观测和空间分辨SED拟合，发现亚毫米星系（SMG）中恒星形成与局部质量分布紧密耦合，且尘埃几何结构（而非经典“光淹效应”）是导致集成拟合中恒星质量被低估（即“尘埃遮蔽偏差”）以及形态波长依赖性的主要驱动因素，其本质致密恒星结构与尘埃连续谱尺寸一致，支持了SMG演化为大质量宁静星系的图像。

title: Projections of Earth's Technosphere: Civilization Collapse-Recovery Dynamics and Detectability
summary: How long a technological civilization remains active, and what determines whether it collapses or persists, is a central question for both projecting humanity's future and assessing the prevalence of detectable intelligence in the galaxy. We model collapse-recovery dynamics across ten plausible futures for Earth-originating civilization using a hybrid deterministic-stochastic simulation over a 1000-year window. The duty cycle, defined as the fraction of its total lifespan that a civilization is technologically active, ranges from ~0.38 to 1.00, with trajectory outcomes shaped by the interplay of governance structure, resource pressure, and hazard exposure. Several model parameters map onto actionable resilience levers, and modest improvements can qualitatively alter long-term trajectories. Sensitivity analysis reveals that the resource depletion rate and the post-collapse recovery fraction are consistently the most impactful levers across scenarios, suggesting that reducing resource consumption may be at least as important as mitigating existential hazards for avoiding civilizational collapse. We discuss implications for Earth's civilizational resilience and for the search for extraterrestrial technosignatures. We also derive an effective detectability duration that accounts for intermittent civilizational activity, and show that the apparent absence of extraterrestrial signals may reflect the prevalence of low-duty-cycle civilizations rather than the rarity of intelligent life.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过模拟地球起源文明的十种未来情景，发现文明的技术活跃度（duty cycle）在约0.38至1.00之间变化，其长期轨迹由治理结构、资源压力和灾害暴露共同塑造，且降低资源消耗率与提升灾后恢复能力是避免崩溃、提升可探测性的关键杠杆。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景或科学主题是评估技术文明（technological civilization）的长期存续可能性及其对地外技术特征（technosignatures）搜寻的启示。
AI.data: 研究使用混合确定性-随机模拟方法，在十个合理的地球起源文明未来情景中，对千年时间窗口内的崩溃-恢复动态进行了建模。
AI.method: 研究采用混合确定性-随机模拟方法，在千年时间窗口内对十个地球起源文明的未来情景进行崩溃-恢复动态建模。
AI.result: 模拟表明，文明的技术活跃期占比（duty cycle）在约0.38至1.00之间，其长期轨迹由治理结构、资源压力和灾害暴露的相互作用塑造。

title: Robust parameter inference for Taiji via time-frequency contrastive learning and normalizing flows
comment: 15 pages, 8 figures
summary: Transient noise artifacts, commonly referred to as glitches, pose a major challenge to parameter inference for space-based gravitational-wave (GW) observations. We develop a glitch-robust amortized inference framework for massive black hole binaries in the Taiji detector configuration by combining conditional normalizing flows, a time-frequency multimodal fusion encoder, and contrastive learning. To enable large-scale training on contaminated data, we further introduce a neural glitch generator that produces high-fidelity synthetic transients at substantially reduced computational cost. Systematic experiments show that, under glitch contamination, the proposed method yields more accurate and better-calibrated posteriors than a conventional Markov Chain Monte Carlo baseline. In ablation studies, the full time-frequency model with contrastive learning performs best overall and remains robust to variations in glitch duration and merger-relative timing. We further show that standard coverage diagnostics alone are insufficient to fully assess posterior fidelity. We therefore complement them with the continuous ranked probability score, which provides a stricter assessment of global distributional agreement in non-ideal GW data. Taken together, these results establish deep-learning-based amortized inference as a promising framework for fast and robust Bayesian parameter estimation in future space-based GW observations.

AI.tldr: 针对太极（Taiji）探测器配置中的大质量黑洞双星，本研究结合条件归一化流、时频多模态融合编码器和对比学习，提出了一种抗瞬态噪声干扰的摊销推断框架，并引入神经瞬态噪声生成器以低成本合成高保真噪声数据，实验表明该方法在噪声污染下能产生比传统马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛基线更准确、校准更好的后验分布，且时频全模型结合对比学习的整体性能最优，同时通过连续排序概率评分补充了标准覆盖诊断，为未来空间引力波观测提供了快速、稳健的贝叶斯参数估计框架。
AI.background: 该研究致力于提升未来空间引力波（gravitational wave）观测中针对大质量黑洞双星（massive black hole binary）参数推断的鲁棒性，以应对瞬态噪声伪影（glitch）带来的重大挑战。
AI.data: 该研究使用了一个神经瞬态噪声生成器（neural glitch generator）来高效产生高保真合成瞬态噪声，以支持大规模训练，并采用了Taiji探测器配置下的受污染引力波数据。
AI.method: 研究结合了条件归一化流（conditional normalizing flows）、时频多模态融合编码器（time-frequency multimodal fusion encoder）和对比学习（contrastive learning），并引入了神经瞬态噪声生成器（neural glitch generator）来高效合成受污染数据以进行大规模训练。
AI.result: 针对引力波观测中瞬态噪声（glitch）干扰的挑战，本研究提出了一种结合条件归一化流、时频多模态融合编码器和对比学习的鲁棒摊销推断框架，并通过系统实验证实，该方法在噪声污染下能比传统马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛基线产生更准确、校准更好的后验分布。

title: Substructures of the Milky Way's Retrograde Halo: Evidence for Multiple Accretion Events
comment: 14 pages, 5 figures, and 4 tables. Submitted to ApJ
summary: We investigate the progenitors of low-inclination retrograde substructures in the Milky Way (MW) halo, which are remnants of accreted dwarf galaxies on retrograde orbits. Our sample consists of halo stars with low orbital inclinations and eccentricities ($0 \le e \le 0.5$), constructed by combining spectroscopic data with $\it Gaia$ astrometry. We identify substructures using metallicity distribution functions (MDFs) in apogalactic distance-orbital phase space. In the low-eccentricity range ($0 \le e \le 0.3$), we find four substructures with MDF peaks at [Fe/H] $\approx -1.5$, $-1.9$, $-2.1$, and $-2.3$. In the intermediate-eccentricity range ($0.3 < e \le 0.5$), we identify five substructures that span [Fe/H] $\approx -1.5$ to $-2.3$. By combining chemical and dynamical information, we show that substructures with identical MDF peaks in the two eccentricity regions can either form coherent structures or remain dynamically distinct. This shows that MDF similarity alone is insufficient to uniquely identify progenitor systems and must be combined with dynamical information. We find that the retrograde halo was assembled through multiple accretion events rather than a single progenitor. The dominant contribution arises from a primary progenitor whose debris traces a coherent metallicity-energy sequence, consistent with hierarchical tidal stripping and core bifurcation. In addition, we identify independent progenitors that contribute to other substructures. In particular, the components with [Fe/H] $\approx -1.7$ are interpreted as a dual-origin population, likely associated with systems accreted at different epochs. These results highlight the complex, multi-progenitor origin of the retrograde stellar halo of the MW.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过结合化学丰度与动力学信息，发现银河系晕中低倾角逆行子结构源于多个矮星系吸积事件而非单一前身星系，其中主要贡献者（primary progenitor）的碎片呈现一致的金属丰度-能量序列，并识别出与不同吸积时期相关的双起源（dual-origin）星族。
AI.background: 该研究聚焦于银河系（Milky Way）晕中低倾角逆行子结构的起源，这些结构是逆行轨道上被吸积的矮星系遗迹。
AI.data: 研究结合了光谱数据与盖亚（Gaia）天体测量数据来构建样本。
AI.method: 研究采用的核心分析方法包括结合光谱数据与盖亚（Gaia）天体测量数据构建样本，并在远银心距离-轨道相空间中利用金属丰度分布函数（MDFs）识别子结构，同时整合化学与动力学信息以区分不同起源。
AI.result: 研究结果表明，银河系（Milky Way）的逆行晕（retrograde halo）具有复杂的多前身起源，主要由一个主要的前身星系通过多次吸积事件组装而成，而非单一前身。

title: Interferometer observations of pulse pairs in an interstellar communication experiment
comment: 10 pages, 11 figures
summary: Synchronized radio telescope-based experiments conducted since 2017, together with subsequent interferometer experiments, provide evidence of an anomalous source of 3.7 Hz bandwidth pulses, sourced from near the direction of the star Rigel. The current experiment, reported here, uses a two-element phase-measuring interferometer to monitor the hypothetical pulse source across azimuths within the beam-widths of the elements of a south-facing interferometer. 123 days of phase measurements of 3.7 Hz bandwidth pulse pairs, adds to the prior evidence that the pulsing signal source has celestial origin. Associated measurements of noise power in 954 Hz and 50 MHz bandwidths, made simultaneous with the 0.27 second duration pulse pair measurements, are presented. Measurement results are presented to aid in the development of independent experimental replication, and alternate and auxiliary explanatory hypotheses.

AI.tldr: 基于对参宿四（Rigel）方向3.7 Hz带宽脉冲对的相位测量，该研究提供了该脉冲源具有天体起源的新证据。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景或科学主题是探测并验证来自参宿七（Rigel）方向、带宽为3.7 Hz的异常脉冲信号的天体物理起源。
AI.data: 该研究使用了一个南向双单元相位测量干涉仪（two-element phase-measuring interferometer）对目标方向进行监测，并同步记录了0.27秒脉冲对测量期间的954赫兹和50兆赫兹带宽的噪声功率数据。
AI.method: 该研究采用了两单元相位测量干涉仪（two-element phase-measuring interferometer）对假设脉冲源进行监测。
AI.result: 基于3.7 Hz带宽脉冲对的相位测量，该研究进一步证实了脉冲信号源具有天体起源。

title: Massive star clusters and clumps in the collisional ring galaxy Arp 147
comment: 21 pages, accepted for publication in MNRAS
summary: We conduct a photometric study of star clusters (or knots) in the collisional ring galaxy (CRG) Arp 147 to trace the star formation history across its empty ring. Using HST F450W, F606W and F814W images, we find that Arp 147 hosts 211 knots and six kpc-size clumps, nearly 60 per cent of which have ages below 10 Myr, and two thirds have masses above $\rm 10^{5}\,M_{\odot}$. The cluster mass function (CMF) of knots with ages between $10 - 200$ Myr deviates from a power-law and follows a Schechter function with a characteristic truncation mass of ${\rm M}_{c} = 6.2 \times 10^{5} \, {\rm M}_{\odot}$. This shape of the CMF is more prominent for a subsample of knots in the eastern region of the ring. Over the same age interval, we derive a low rate of disruption ($δ\sim 0.25$) from the cluster age function and a cluster formation efficiency (CFE) of $\sim$ 3 per cent. In contrast, the CFE in the $1 - 10$ Myr age range is nearly 40 per cent. We note the lack of high-resolution UV and H$α$ observations to help break age-extinction degeneracy which affects the derived ages for dusty young clusters and old ones with low reddening. Nevertheless, this study has shown, at least to a first-order approximation, that collision-triggered starburst events happening across the CRG offer an ideal environment for a second generation of young blue knots to form in abundance. It also suggests that the drop-through collision between the two galaxies can fuel at least mild cluster disruption over time.

AI.tldr: 对碰撞环星系（CRG）Arp 147的星团（或星结）测光研究发现，其环上年龄在10-200 Myr的星团质量函数偏离幂律并符合特征截断质量为6.2×10⁵ M⊙的Schechter函数，且碰撞触发的星暴事件促进了大量第二代年轻蓝色星结的形成。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景或科学主题是探究碰撞环星系（CRG）中星团（或星结）的恒星形成历史，以理解星系碰撞触发的星暴事件对第二代年轻星团形成的影响。
AI.data: 研究使用了哈勃空间望远镜（HST）的F450W、F606W和F814W波段图像数据。
AI.method: 采用哈勃空间望远镜（HST）的F450W、F606W和F814W图像进行测光研究，并使用星团质量函数（CMF）的Schechter函数拟合及星团年龄函数分析，以推导星团瓦解率和形成效率（CFE）。
AI.result: 在10-200 Myr年龄段的星团（或结）的质量函数（CMF）偏离幂律分布，遵循特征截断质量为${\rm M}_{c} = 6.2 \times 10^{5} \, {\rm M}_{\odot}$的Schechter函数。

title: The ALMA-QUARKS Survey: Multipolar episodic molecular outflow associated with W49N, the most energetic water maser source in the Milky Way
comment: 13 pages, 5 figures, resubmitted to AJ after revision per reviewer comments
summary: We present a detailed investigation of a multipolar episodic molecular outflow in the mini-starburst region W49N, which hosts the most luminous water maser in the Galaxy. Using high-resolution ($\sim$0.3 arcsec) Atacama Large Millimeter/submillimeter Array (ALMA) observations of the $\mathrm{^{12}CO}$ emission as part of the ALMA-QUARKS survey, we analyze the morphology and kinematics of the outflow. Our observations reveal four newly identified outflow lobes in addition to the previously known central bipolar jet. These lobes appear more jet-like rather than exhibiting wide opening angles. Based on the $\mathrm{^{12}CO}$ (2--1) and $\mathrm{^{13}CO}$ (2--1) emission, we provide a more reliable estimate of the outflow's physical parameters, confirming it as one of the most energetic outflows in the Galaxy. Notably, these newly discovered lobes exhibit chains of knots, a characteristic signature of episodic ejection. Furthermore, two of the lobes display prominent S-shaped wiggles, suggestive of a precessing jet. The discovery of these features -- commonly observed in outflows from low-mass protostars -- in such an extreme massive star-forming environment provides compelling evidence that some underlying physical mechanisms for launching outflows are conserved across a wide range of stellar masses.

AI.tldr: 通过对W49N区域的高分辨率ALMA观测，该研究在已知中心双极喷流外新识别出四个呈喷流状、带有节点链和S形扭动（表明为间歇性抛射和进动喷流）的外流瓣（outflow lobes），并提供了更可靠的物理参数估计，证实其为银河系内能量最高的外流之一，这些在极端大质量恒星形成区发现通常与低质量原恒星外流相关的特征，为外流产生的某些基本物理机制在不同恒星质量范围内具有保守性提供了有力证据。
AI.background: 该研究聚焦于大质量恒星形成区W49N中多极、间歇性分子外流（multipolar episodic molecular outflow）的观测与性质分析。
AI.data: 研究使用了阿塔卡马大型毫米波/亚毫米波阵列（ALMA）的高分辨率（约0.3角秒）观测数据，这些数据来自ALMA-QUARKS巡天项目，具体观测了12CO和13CO（2-1）谱线发射。
AI.method: 该研究采用高分辨率（约0.3角秒）的阿塔卡马大型毫米波/亚毫米波阵列（ALMA）对一氧化碳（12CO）发射的观测数据，分析了分子外流的形态和运动学。
AI.result: 基于高分辨率ALMA观测，该研究在W49N区域新识别出四个具有链状结（knots）和S形摆动特征的喷流状外流瓣，为极端大质量恒星形成环境中存在与低质量原恒星类似的间歇性、进动喷流机制提供了有力证据。

title: CHILES XII: The H I evolution of Luminous Compact Blue Galaxies
comment: 11 pages, 9 figures, 3 tables
summary: We study the evolution of Luminous Compact Blue Galaxies (LCBGs) by making use of H I emission line data provided by the full 856 h COSMOS H I Large Extragalactic Survey (CHILES), which spans a redshift range of $0\leq z\leq 0.48$ within the COSMOS field. We report the results on a cubelet stacking analysis, which we use to estimate the average H I mass evolution of LCBGs in the field up to $z=0.48$. For the stacks that do not show a detection, we report an upper limit estimate of the average H I mass. We also report on two directly detected LCBGs. We find the average H I mass in LCBGs at redshifts $z=0.26$, $z=0.35$ and $z=0.45$ respectively to be $\langle M_{\rm HI}\rangle<4.89\times10^9$ M$_\odot$, $\langle M_{\rm HI}\rangle=(2.49\pm0.75)\times10^9$ M$_\odot$ and $\langle M_{\rm HI}\rangle=(6.44\pm2.71)\times10^9$ M$_\odot$. We see no strong evidence for evolution in the average H I mass over this redshift range, consistent with other recent studies of the evolution of the H I in galaxies at $z<0.5$. On average, LCBGs appear to retain substantial gas reservoirs, with gas fractions staying constant and remaining broadly consistent with those of the larger star-forming population. LCBG gas depletion timescales are nearly an order of magnitude shorter than in normal star-forming galaxies across the studied redshift range, aligning with the period during which their number density drops sharply.

AI.tldr: 基于CHILES巡天数据，通过叠加分析发现红移z<0.5范围内明亮致密蓝星系（LCBGs）的平均中性氢（H I）质量未呈现显著演化，其气体储量保持稳定，但气体消耗时标比正常恒星形成星系短近一个数量级，与其数量密度急剧下降的时期相符。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景是探究发光致密蓝星系（LCBGs）在宇宙学时间尺度上的中性氢（H I）气体质量演化及其与星系演化关键阶段（如恒星形成活动骤减期）的关联。
AI.data: 研究使用了来自完整856小时COSMOS H I大尺度河外巡天（CHILES）的H I发射线数据，该数据覆盖了COSMOS天区内0 ≤ z ≤ 0.48的红移范围。
AI.method: 采用立方体堆叠分析（cubelet stacking analysis）方法估算平均中性氢（H I）质量演化，并对未探测样本给出平均中性氢质量上限估计。
AI.result: 在红移z=0.26、z=0.35和z=0.45处，亮致密蓝星系（LCBGs）的平均中性氢（H I）质量分别为<4.89×10^9 M⊙、(2.49±0.75)×10^9 M⊙和(6.44±2.71)×10^9 M⊙，且在此红移范围内未发现平均中性氢质量发生显著演化的强证据。

title: Witnessing the onset of stellar winds in Super-Luminous Supernova Hosts: implications for star-formation-driven outflows in low and high-redshift galaxies
comment: 14 pages, 7 figures, 2 tables; submitted to ApJ
summary: Direct observational constraints on the earliest, stellar-wind-dominated phases of galactic outflows remain scarce. We present medium-resolution VLT/X-shooter spectroscopy of six Type I superluminous supernova (SLSN-I) host galaxies at z = 0.15-0.51, exploiting the bright SLSN continua as single, down-the-barrel probes of the host interstellar medium. From nebular emission lines we derive dust-corrected star-formation rates as low as 0.06-0.44 Msun yr$^{-1}$, and gas-phase metallicities in the extremely metal-poor regime (less than nine percent solar). Moreover, all hosts exhibit narrow, blueshifted Mg II 2796, 2803 absorption, indicative of the presence of low-ionization outflows along the line of sight. Voigt modeling of the Mg II absorption yields maximum outflow velocities of $v_{max}$ = 37-104 km s$^{-1}$, placing these galaxies systematically below the empirical $v_{max}$-SFR relations for more evolved galaxies of similar SFR. Given the short lifetimes of the SLSN massive progenitors, we argue that these outflows must originate from preceding stellar wind episodes. Assuming a constant-velocity outflow over 3 Myr and spherical symmetry, we infer wind masses M$_{wind}$ = (0.02-1.0) $\times 10^6$ Msun and mass-outflow rates $\dot{M}_{wind} = 0.01-0.33$ Msun yr$^{-1}$, corresponding to mass-loading factors $η<1$. These results indicate that, during the first few Myr of a burst, stellar winds and radiation pressure alone drive slow and weak outflows in low-mass systems, prior to the onset of dominant supernova feedback. Our work provides one of the first empirical constraints on early feedback phases relevant for high-redshift galaxies, and for time-dependent implementations of stellar feedback in galaxy formation simulations.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过分析六个I型极亮超新星（SLSN-I）宿主星系（z=0.15-0.51）的光谱，首次直接观测到在恒星形成早期（数Myr内）、由恒星风主导的星系外流（outflow），发现这些低质量、极贫金属（小于9%太阳丰度）星系的外流速度（37-104 km s$^{-1}$）和质量加载因子（$η<1$）均低于具有相似恒星形成率的更成熟星系，表明在超新星反馈主导之前，恒星风和辐射压即可驱动缓慢而微弱的外流。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景或主题是探索低质量星系在恒星形成早期阶段（即超新星主导反馈启动前）由恒星风和辐射压驱动的、缓慢且微弱的外流（outflow），以提供对高红移星系早期反馈阶段及星系形成模拟中时变恒星反馈的实证约束。
AI.data: 研究使用了甚大望远镜（VLT）上的X-shooter摄谱仪对六个红移在0.15至0.51之间的I型极亮超新星（SLSN-I）宿主星系进行了中分辨率光谱观测，并利用这些超新星的明亮连续谱作为单视线方向上的探针来研究宿主星系的星际介质。
AI.method: 采用中分辨率VLT/X-shooter光谱技术，利用SLSN的连续谱作为单视线方向探针，并对Mg II吸收线进行沃伊特（Voigt）剖面建模。
AI.result: 通过利用SLSN-I作为单视线探针，在低质量系统中首次观测到由恒星风和辐射压驱动的低速弱外流，其最大速度（37-104 km s⁻¹）低于类似SFR的更演化星系的经验关系。

title: Bayesian Analysis of Gravitational Wave Microlensing Effects from Galactic Double White Dwarfs
comment: 21 pages, 7 figures
summary: Gravitational waves (GWs) from the galactic double white dwarf (DWD) systems are one of the primary targets for upcoming space-based detectors. Due to their vast abundance and widespread distribution throughout the Galactic disk and bulge, these systems may provide a high-statistical population for probing GW microlensing effects induced by Galactic compact objects. To evaluate the detectability of such effects, in this work we simulate the four-year observation of DWD systems by Taiji, in the form of a second-generation Time Delay Interferometry (TDI) data stream. Within a Bayesian inference framework, we estimate parameters for lensed GWs from DWD systems for different values of the lens parameters, including the lens mass $M_\mathrm{L}\in [10, 10^6]$\,M$_\odot$, the effective velocity $v_\mathrm{eff}\in [50, 500]$\,km/s and the initial separation $L\in [R_\mathrm{E}, 3R_\mathrm{E}]$, and obtain the uncertainties of the corresponding parameters. These results characterize the capability of future Taiji observations to probe such systems. We further employ the Bayesian model selection framework to distinguish between lensed and unlensed scenarios, and investigate the impacts of three key physical parameters of the lens system: $M_\mathrm{L}$, $v_\mathrm{eff}$, and $L$ on distinguishing lensing events. Our results show that when $M_\mathrm{L}$ is below $10^5$\,M$_\odot$ or $L\geq3R_\mathrm{E}$, it is not possible to distinguish between lensed and unlensed models. For $v_\mathrm{eff}$, although the Bayes factor decreases as $v_\mathrm{eff}$ decreases, the lensed and unlensed models can still be distinguished within our parameter range.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过模拟太极探测器对银河系双白矮星（DWD）系统引力波（GW）的四年观测，评估了透镜质量（$M_\mathrm{L}$）、有效速度（$v_\mathrm{eff}$）和初始分离（$L$）等参数对探测引力波微透镜效应的影响，并发现当透镜质量低于$10^5$\,M$_\odot$或初始分离大于等于3倍爱因斯坦半径（$R_\mathrm{E}$）时，无法区分透镜与非透镜模型。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景或主题是探索利用空间引力波探测器通过微引力透镜效应探测银河系内致密天体（如双白矮星系统）的潜力。
AI.data: 本研究使用模拟的太极（Taiji）探测器四年观测数据，数据形式为第二代时延干涉（Time Delay Interferometry, TDI）数据流。
AI.method: 采用贝叶斯推断框架（Bayesian inference framework）和贝叶斯模型选择框架（Bayesian model selection framework）对透镜化引力波进行参数估计和模型区分。
AI.result: 通过贝叶斯模型选择框架分析透镜系统关键物理参数（透镜质量$M_\mathrm{L}$、有效速度$v_\mathrm{eff}$和初始分离$L$）对区分透镜事件的影响，发现当$M_\mathrm{L}$低于$10^5$\,M$_\odot$或$L\geq3R_\mathrm{E}$时无法区分透镜与非透镜模型，而在参数范围内有效速度$v_\mathrm{eff}$的降低虽会减小贝叶斯因子（Bayes factor），但仍可区分两类模型。

title: Radial Distribution of Star Formation and Gas-phase Metallicity in Spiral-Elliptical Galaxy Pairs
comment: 13 pages, 5 figures, revised version resubmitted to ApJ
summary: Using integral field spectroscopy from SDSS-IV MaNGA, we investigate the radial distributions of star formation rate (SFR) and gas-phase metallicity in spiral galaxies that reside in spiral-elliptical (S+E) pairs. Spirals in S+E pairs show suppressed central star formation and elevated metallicities, whereas spirals in spiral-spiral pairs exhibit centrally enhanced star formation and reduced metallicities. The degree of SFR suppression and metallicity enhancement in S+E pairs depends on the masses of the pair members. Spirals with more massive elliptical companions experience stronger star-formation suppression and larger increases in metallicity, while lower-mass spirals show more pronounced metallicity enhancement. In addition, within S+E systems, galaxies with asymmetric gas velocity fields display enhanced SFR and higher metallicities, whereas those with symmetric velocity fields exhibit clear central suppression. Based on these results, we infer that in S+E pairs, the spiral galaxy experiences suppressed gas accretion once it enters the hot circumgalactic medium of its early-type companion, which leads to the observed decline in star-formation activity. When a close encounter takes place, tidal perturbations can compress the remaining cold gas and trigger enhanced star formation, producing rapid chemical enrichment and the associated increase in metallicity.

AI.tldr: 基于SDSS-IV MaNGA积分视场光谱，本研究发现螺旋-椭圆（S+E）对中的螺旋星系（研究对象）中心恒星形成率（SFR）受抑制且金属丰度升高，其程度取决于伴星系的质星以及气体速度场的对称性，并推断该现象源于螺旋星系进入早型伴星的热环星系介质后气体吸积受抑制以及近距离遭遇时的潮汐扰动触发恒星形成与化学增丰。
AI.background: 该研究聚焦于旋涡星系与椭圆星系配对（S+E pairs）中星系的星形成率（SFR）和气体金属丰度的径向分布特征及其与伴星质量和气体动力学的关系。
AI.data: 研究使用的观测数据来源于SDSS-IV MaNGA（Mapping Nearby Galaxies at Apache Point Observatory）巡天的积分视场光谱（integral field spectroscopy）。
AI.method: 采用积分视场光谱（integral field spectroscopy）技术分析径向分布。
AI.result: 螺旋-椭圆星系对中的螺旋星系进入早型伴星的热环星系介质后气体吸积受到抑制，导致其中心恒星形成率下降。

title: A Salpeter-like filament linear density function across nearby molecular clouds
comment: 13 pages, 5 main figures, plus 2 extended data figures; submitted to Nature Astronomy
summary: Filamentary structures in molecular clouds are thought to play a central role in star formation, yet the statistical distribution of their mass per unit length -- and any connection to the stellar initial mass function (IMF) -- remains poorly constrained observationally. Here we present a systematic analysis of the filament linear density function (FLDF) across seven nearby molecular clouds spanning $\sim$100--1000\,pc in distance and a wide range of star-forming environments, from quiescent to massive, using the multiscale extraction method $getsf$. The median linear densities of filaments increase approximately linearly with spatial scale, $\tildeΛ \propto Y$, and the fraction of supercritical filaments varies widely among clouds, from a few per cent to over 50%. Only when integrating over the full hierarchy of spatial scales do the combined linear densities across all clouds yield a FLDF that follows a power law ${\rm d}N/{\rm d}\logΛ\propto Λ^{-α}$ with $α\approx 1.30$--$1.34$, mirroring the Salpeter IMF slope of $1.35$. Our results suggest that the stellar mass spectrum is pre-encoded in the filamentary structure of molecular clouds, providing a direct observational link between the large-scale distribution of interstellar gas and the universal slope of the stellar IMF.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过多尺度提取方法系统分析了七个邻近分子云中丝状结构（filament）的线密度函数（FLDF），发现其整体线密度分布呈现幂律斜率（α≈1.30–1.34），与恒星初始质量函数（IMF）的Salpeter斜率（1.35）一致，表明恒星质量谱已预先编码在分子云的丝状结构中。
AI.background: 该研究探讨了分子云中丝状结构（filamentary structures）在恒星形成中的核心作用及其与恒星初始质量函数（IMF）的潜在联系。
AI.data: 研究使用多尺度提取方法$getsf$系统分析了七个距离约100–1000 pc、覆盖从宁静到活跃大质量恒星形成等多种环境的邻近分子云中的丝状体线性密度函数（FLDF）。
AI.method: 采用多尺度提取方法 $getsf$ 对七个不同距离和恒星形成环境的邻近分子云进行了系统分析，以研究其丝状结构线性密度函数（FLDF）。
AI.result: 对七个近邻分子云（距离约100-1000 pc）中丝状体线性密度函数（FLDF）的系统分析表明，当整合所有空间尺度时，所有云的综合线性密度产生的FLDF遵循幂律分布 ${\rm d}N/{\rm d}\logΛ\propto Λ^{-α}$，其指数 $α\approx 1.30$--$1.34$，与恒星初始质量函数（IMF）的Salpeter斜率（1.35）相符。

title: The Radial and Vertical Structure of Molecular Gas in the Edge-On Galaxy NGC 4565
comment: Submitted to A.J. 30 pages, 16 figures, 5 tables
summary: We present high-resolution (0.94" $\approx$ 55 pc) ALMA CO(2-1) and 13CO(2-1) observations of the highly inclined (i~87.5 deg) galaxy NGC 4565 covering out to galactocentric radius Rgal > $\pm$ 17 kpc. The combination of sensitivity and resolution enables the detection of CO emission well into the HI-dominated outer disk while isolating individual molecular clouds across the full extent of the galaxy. Although often described as an edge-on Milky Way analog, the molecular gas profile of NGC 4565 has a central gap which is more similar to M31. The 13CO/12CO ratio remains consistent at 0.086 $\pm$ 0.009 from Rgal = 5-13 kpc. Based on fits to position-velocity slices, the molecular disk remains thin, with a FWHM scale height of 79.1 $\pm$ 1.6 pc measured from the vertical intensity profile with little evidence for vertical flaring. Molecular clouds in NGC 4565 show sizes, linewidths, and surface densities consistent with those found in similar environments in PHANGS-ALMA galaxies and in M31. We identify a prominent star-forming complex on the ring-an overdensity of molecular gas we term the East Ring Pileup. This feature hosts a compact, multiwavelength-bright region, which we call the Jewel. Effects of galaxy inclination on molecular cloud radius, velocity dispersion, surface density, and virial parameter appear as second-order effects that are strongest in velocity dispersion. At this resolution, GMCs are preferentially aligned with the disk of the galaxy and horizontally elongated by a factor of~2.

AI.tldr: 基于高分辨率ALMA观测，该研究发现NGC 4565星系的分子气体盘（molecular disk）在垂直方向上保持薄盘结构（半高全宽为79.1±1.6 pc）且无明显翘曲，其分子云特性与PHANGS-ALMA星系及M31相似，并识别出一个被称为“东环堆积”（East Ring Pileup）的显著恒星形成复合体。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景或主题是借助高分辨率毫米波观测（ALMA）研究高度侧向（edge-on）星系（NGC 4565）的分子气体分布、物理性质及其与星系结构（如分子盘厚度、分子云特性）和恒星形成活动的关系。
AI.data: 本研究使用了阿塔卡马大型毫米波/亚毫米波阵列（ALMA）观测的高分辨率（0.94角秒，约55秒差距）CO(2-1)和13CO(2-1)谱线数据，覆盖了高度倾斜（倾角约87.5度）的星系NGC 4565，其观测范围延伸至星系中心半径大于正负17千秒差距的外围区域。
AI.method: 研究采用了高分辨率（0.94角秒）的阿塔卡马大型毫米波/亚毫米波阵列（ALMA）对CO(2-1)和13CO(2-1)谱线进行观测，并结合对位置-速度切片（position-velocity slices）的拟合以及垂直强度剖面分析等核心分析方法。
AI.result: 分子盘保持薄层结构，其垂直强度剖面测得的半高全宽（FWHM）尺度高度为79.1±1.6 pc，且几乎没有垂直耀斑（vertical flaring）的证据。

title: SN 2022riv in RX J2129: Discovery, Spectroscopic Classification, and Microlensing of a Strongly Lensed Type Ia Supernova from JWST and HST Observations
comment: 25 pages, 16 figures + appendices
summary: The multiply imaged SN 2022riv was discovered through a search of galaxy cluster fields as part of a Hubble Space Telescope (HST) SNAP program to find highly magnified stars. The supernova (SN) was detected in the last-to-arrive image of a galaxy at redshift $z=1.522$ strongly lensed by the foreground galaxy cluster RX J2129.7+0005. Follow up James Webb Space Telescope (JWST) NIRSpec G140M and PRISM spectroscopy yields a Type Ia SN classification. Using the SALT3-NIR light-curve fitter, we obtain a cosmology-independent measurement of the magnification of $5.35\pm1.01$ for the last-to-arrive image of the SN, with multiple SALT SN spectral time-series models yielding consistent constraints. The last-to-arrive image of SN 2022riv we detect appeared adjacent to the brightest cluster galaxy (BCG) at a location with an exceptionally high stellar mass density ($\sim 1-2$ dex higher than that of SN Refsdal), where microlensing is expected to introduce a 20-50% modulation of the magnification. Analyzing six independent lens models of the cluster, we find that four predict the magnification with much greater precision ($p < 0.05$) than would be expected by random chance, given the large effect anticipated from microlensing. Five models yield magnifications of roughly $4-7$ (within $1σ$) prior to accounting for microlensing, whereas HoliGRALE favors a significantly higher value of $15.39 \pm 0.85$. After incorporating nominal microlensing, the HoliGRALE prediction is within $1σ$ tension with our measurement. A companion paper (Dalrymple et al.) will present constraints on the relative time delay of the image that arrived earlier.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过哈勃和韦伯太空望远镜观测，在星系团RX J2129.7+0005引力透镜背景下，对红移$z=1.522$处多重成像的Ia型超新星SN 2022riv的最后一幅到达图像进行了测量，获得了宇宙学无关的$5.35\pm1.01$放大率，并发现微引力透镜效应（microlensing）预期会引入20-50%的调制，而多个透镜模型预测的精度显著高于随机预期，其中HoliGRALE模型预测值在纳入微透镜效应后与测量值存在$1σ$张力。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景或主题是利用引力透镜效应（gravitational lensing）探测高红移（high-redshift）宇宙中的高放大率超新星（highly magnified supernovae），特别是通过哈勃空间望远镜（Hubble Space Telescope, HST）和詹姆斯·韦伯空间望远镜（James Webb Space Telescope, JWST）对星系团（galaxy cluster）引力透镜场（lensing fields）的观测来研究宇宙学和微引力透镜（microlensing）效应。
AI.data: 研究中使用的数据来源于哈勃空间望远镜（HST）的SNAP项目观测以及詹姆斯·韦伯空间望远镜（JWST）的NIRSpec G140M和PRISM光谱仪后续观测。
AI.method: 采用SALT3-NIR光变曲线拟合器（SALT3-NIR light-curve fitter）进行宇宙学无关的放大倍数测量，并结合多个SALT超新星光谱时间序列模型进行一致性约束。
AI.result: 通过SALT3-NIR光变曲线拟合，对超新星最后到达图像的宇宙学独立放大率测量值为$5.35\pm1.01$，且多个SALT光谱时序模型给出了一致的约束。

title: Potentials of axisymmetric razor-thin disks
summary: We investigate the gravitational potentials generated by axisymmetric, razor-thin disks. Within certain limitations, the potential on one side of the disk is shown to be equivalent to the potential produced by a linear mass distribution along the axis perpendicular to the disk. We first establish the connection between two mass distributions that generate the same potential. We then consider all disk surface density profiles that produce the potential equivalent to those generated by linear mass distributions, specifically those defined by the elementary beta distribution and its relatives on the interval $[0,1]$, $[1,\infty)$ or $[0,\infty)$. These families of models are important because the potentials in all cases are given by, at most, a single real quadrature of elementary functions of the coordinates, and furthermore, many cases result in closed-form expressions. The potential of many realistic disks may be constructed from some combinations of these disk models.

AI.tldr: 该研究针对轴对称无限薄盘（razor-thin disks）的引力势，证明了其盘一侧的势等价于垂直于盘的轴线上线质量分布的势，并系统给出了与特定区间上β分布族等价的盘面密度模型，这些模型的势至多只需对坐标初等函数进行一次实积分且常可解析表达，为构建现实盘势提供了基础。
AI.background: 该研究聚焦于轴对称薄盘（axisymmetric, razor-thin disks）引力势的理论构建与等价性分析。
AI.data: 本研究采用理论建模与数学推导方法，未使用观测或仿真数据。
AI.method: 采用的核心分析方法是将轴对称薄盘（razor-thin disks）的引力势等效于垂直于盘面的轴上线性质量分布所产生的势，并基于此等价关系，研究由初等β分布及其相关分布在特定区间定义的表面密度剖面。
AI.result: 主要科学发现是：轴对称薄盘（razor-thin disks）在特定条件下，其一侧势场等价于垂直于盘面的轴上线性质量分布所产生的势场，并建立了产生相同势场的两种质量分布之间的联系。

title: Radiation hydrodynamic simulations for the origin of quasi-periodic oscillations for accretion onto supermassive black holes
comment: Accepted by MNRAS
summary: Quasi-periodic oscillation (QPO) has been detected in several accreting supermassive black hole (SMBH) systems, including active galactic nuclei (AGNs) and tidal disruption events (TDEs). However, despite that several models have been proposed, the physical origin of QPO is still unclear. In this paper, we performed radiation hydrodynamic simulations of accretion flow by injecting mass at a fixed radius, i.e. 10 Schwarzschild radius with different mass accretion rates, and setting the black hole (BH) mass to $10^7M_{\odot}$. We find that there are QPO signals by analyzing the mass inflow rates as a function of time from the simulations for different radii. The QPO frequencies from our simulations are well consistent with the radial epicyclic frequencies from analytic calculations for radius greater than a critical radius 3.8 Schwarzschild radius. This critical radius corresponds to the maximum epicyclic frequency, i.e. $ν_{\rm r,max}$, in the radial direction. We proposed that $ν_{\rm r,max}$ can be a good proxy for the observed QPO $ν_{\rm QPO}$. Furthermore, assuming that our simulation results can be scaled to different BH masses $M_{\rm BH}$, we find that the theoretical relation of $ν_{\rm r,max}$ as a function of $M_{\rm BH}$ can well match $ν_{\rm QPO}$ as a function of $M_{\rm BH}$ for a sample of AGN and TDE. Finally, we discuss the effects of the BH mass, general relativity (GR), and other possible factors including the size of the mass injecting radius, viscosity and magnetic field on the simulation results.

AI.tldr: 通过辐射流体动力学模拟发现，在超大质量黑洞（SMBH）吸积流中，观测到的准周期振荡（QPO）频率与理论计算的最大径向本轮频率（$ν_{\rm r,max}$）在临界半径（3.8倍史瓦西半径）处相符，且该关系可推广解释不同质量黑洞的活动星系核（AGN）和潮汐瓦解事件（TDE）样本。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景是探索吸积超大质量黑洞（SMBH）系统中准周期振荡（QPO）的物理起源。
AI.data: 本研究使用了基于特定初始条件（在10倍史瓦西半径处以固定质量吸积率注入物质，并设定黑洞质量为$10^7M_{\odot}$）进行辐射流体动力学模拟（radiation hydrodynamic simulations）所产生的数据。
AI.method: 采用辐射流体动力学（radiation hydrodynamic）模拟，通过在不同吸积率下于固定半径（10倍史瓦西半径）注入质量，并设置黑洞质量为$10^7M_{\odot}$，分析了不同半径处质量流入率随时间的变化。
AI.result: 研究发现，模拟得到的准周期振荡（QPO）频率在大于临界半径（3.8倍史瓦西半径）时与解析计算得到的径向本轮频率（radial epicyclic frequency）高度一致，并认为最大径向本轮频率（$ν_{\rm r,max}$）可作为观测到的$ν_{\rm QPO}$的良好代理。

title: JOYS$+$: A JWST/MIRI survey of the evolution of H$_2$ winds and jets from low-mass protostars
comment: 18 Pages, 12 figures. Accepted for publication in Astronomy & Astrophysics
summary: Protostellar outflows display wide-angle winds and collimated jets, the magnetocentrifugal launching of which enables accretion onto the protostar. The majority of the outflow mass is likely ejected or entrained molecular H$_2$, which can now be studied in unprecedented detail with JWST. Using JWST MIRI/MRS observations towards 13 single and 20 multiple Class 0 and I protostars, we investigate the nature and evolution of the H$_2$ wind and jet morphology, mass outflow rate, and velocity and temperature structure. We construct line flux and velocity maps of the H$_2$ S(1) and S(7) lines as well as the sub-mm CO traced by ALMA. Low-$J$ ($J\le4$) H$_2$ transitions trace extended wide-angle, low-velocity (0-20 km s$^{-1}$) winds within the contours of the low-velocity ($< 30$ km s$^{-1}$) sub-mm CO emission, while high-$J$ ($J >5$) transitions are associated with shocks and knots. In Class 0 sources with a known high-velocity ($> 30$ km s$^{-1}$) molecular CO or SiO jet, higher H$_2$ velocities are found along the jet axis. The opening angle of the wind traced by the H$_2$ S(1) line broadens from $\sim20^\circ$ to $\sim90^\circ$ through the Class 0 to Class I stage. Near the base of each blue-shifted outflow lobe, we extract representative spectra, where rotation diagram fitting of the H$_2$ lines is combined with the outflow width and H$_2$ line velocity to measure the mass-loss rates. The rotation diagrams show a warm $\sim 600$ K, component with two orders of magnitude more mass than the hot, 1500-3000 K component. The H$_2$ outflow mass-loss rates decline by two orders of magnitude from the Class 0 to Class II stage and are correlated with bolometric luminosity. The declining warm H$_2$ mass loss rates and increasing opening angles from the Class 0 to I stages, and the absence of H$_2$ jets in the Class I sources, are consistent with the predictions of MHD disk wind models.

AI.tldr: 基于JWST对33颗原恒星（Class 0和I）的观测，该研究发现H₂外流的质量损失率从Class 0到Class II阶段下降两个数量级，且其增大的喷流张角和温度结构与磁流体力学（MHD）盘风模型预测一致。
AI.background: 该研究聚焦于利用JWST（詹姆斯·韦伯空间望远镜）的MIRI/MRS观测，探究原恒星（Class 0和I阶段）分子氢（H$_2$）外流的性质与演化，包括其形态、质量损失率以及速度与温度结构。
AI.data: 研究使用了JWST MIRI/MRS对13个单星和20个多重原恒星（Class 0和I）的观测数据，以及ALMA对亚毫米波CO的示踪数据。
AI.method: 研究采用JWST MIRI/MRS观测数据，结合ALMA亚毫米波CO数据，通过构建H₂ S(1)和S(7)谱线的流量与速度图，并利用旋转图（rotation diagram）拟合H₂谱线，结合外流宽度和线速度测量质量损失率。
AI.result: H$_2$外流质量损失率从0类到II类阶段下降两个数量级，并与光度相关。
